rows.feature: ext2spice top-label → port promotion (port makeall default ON)
rows.commercial: Calibre nmLVS auto top-port derivation from labels
rows.notes: 82d8fb33: esAutoPromoteTopPorts() promotes real labels (not plane_x_y# placeholders) to EF_PORT; stock emitted empty .subckt top → patched .subckt top DRN SRC Gnd GATE. Feeds netgen's portless-anchor guard. Restorable via ext2spice port makeall off.
rows.feature_zh: ext2spice 頂層 label → port 提升（port makeall 預設開啟）
rows.notes_zh: 82d8fb33：esAutoPromoteTopPorts() 將真實 label（非 plane_x_y# 佔位符）提升為 EF_PORT；原版輸出空的 .subckt top → 修補後為 .subckt top DRN SRC Gnd GATE。餵給 netgen 的無 port 錨定防護。可用 ext2spice port makeall off 還原。

rows.feature: SPECIALNET power/ground name propagation onto extracted substrate/well/stripe nodes
rows.notes: 5aea4c24 (B): USE POWER/GROUND net name was collapsed to $SUB/leaf auto-name → now labeled so netgen can anchor globals; .subckt gains VPWR VGND ports.
rows.feature_zh: 將 SPECIALNET 的電源/接地名稱傳播到萃取出的 substrate/well/stripe 節點
rows.notes_zh: 5aea4c24（B）：USE POWER/GROUND 的 net 名稱原本被塌縮成 $SUB/leaf 自動命名 → 現在會加上標籤，讓 netgen 能錨定 global；.subckt 因而多出 VPWR VGND port。

rows.feature: Connectivity-graph LVS partition seed when top ports/names absent
rows.notes: ROADMAP §2.4 — primarily netgen-side (partition currently name/port-seeded). magic's job (#21/#22) is to *supply* the anchors; cross-ref netgen plan.
rows.feature_zh: 當缺少頂層 port/名稱時，以連通性圖作為 LVS 分割種子
rows.notes_zh: ROADMAP §2.4——主要在 netgen 端（目前分割以名稱/port 為種子）。magic 的職責（#21/#22）是提供錨點；交叉參照 netgen 計畫。
rows.reclass_note: [OWNED-BY-ANOTHER-TOOL] Confirmed tracked on the netgen side, not merely assumed: scratchpad/completed_enhancements/netgen3.json records it under skipped as A7 - 'algorithm-hard: graph-seed partition anchoring for a portless top, must only accept...' - i.e. netgen has it and has deferred it there as algorithm-hard. It should not appear as a pending MAGIC row. | Connectivity-graph LVS partition seeding is netgen's: netgen

rows.feature: Resistance extraction (sheet-R geometry, extresist)
rows.notes: Core (resis/); upstream crash + minres 0 + resistor-syntax fixes already in fork (3b272cc8, dc2ecf35, e7b8e89d).
rows.feature_zh: 電阻萃取（sheet-R 幾何、extresist）
rows.notes_zh: 核心（resis/）；上游的 crash + minres 0 + 電阻語法修正已在 fork 中（3b272cc8、dc2ecf35、e7b8e89d）。

rows.feature: Area + perimeter + fringe capacitance extraction
rows.notes: Core (table coefficients from tech file). 2.5D, not field-solver.
rows.feature_zh: 面積 + 周長 + 邊緣（fringe）電容萃取
rows.notes_zh: 核心（係數取自 tech file 的表格）。屬 2.5D，非 field-solver。

rows.feature: Coupling capacitance (sidewall / overlap tables)
rows.notes: Core (extract/ExtCouple.c). Table/pattern-based; accuracy is the OSS floor vs field solver (#29).
rows.feature_zh: 耦合電容（sidewall / overlap 表格）
rows.notes_zh: 核心（extract/ExtCouple.c）。以表格/圖樣為基礎；精度相對 field solver 為 OSS 下限（#29）。

rows.feature: Resistor pi / tee model, no floating node
rows.notes: Upstream b266ec62 (pi default, distributes device-cap to terminals; tee via ext2spice resistor tee on). In fork.
rows.feature_zh: 電阻 pi / tee 模型，無浮接節點
rows.notes_zh: 上游 b266ec62（pi 為預設，將元件電容分配到端點；tee 需以 ext2spice resistor tee on 啟用）。已在 fork 中。

rows.feature: SPEF / DSPF output (standard parasitic exchange format)
rows.notes: ext2spice emits SPICE R/C, not SPEF. Add a SPEF/DSPF writer over the existing extracted RC network so STA/PEX consumers can ingest magic parasitics. Unblocks a real interop gap.
rows.feature_zh: SPEF / DSPF 輸出（標準寄生交換格式）
rows.notes_zh: ext2spice 輸出的是 SPICE R/C，而非 SPEF。需在既有萃取出的 RC 網路之上加一個 SPEF/DSPF 寫出器，讓 STA/PEX 消費端能吃進 magic 的寄生。可解開一個真實的互通缺口。

rows.feature: Signoff-grade 3-D field-solver parasitics
rows.commercial: Cadence Quantus QRC-FS · Synopsys StarRC · Calibre xACT-3D
rows.notes: Accuracy is calibrated to encrypted foundry ITF/nxtgrd/QRC-tech = EXTERNAL. The RC engine is forkable: wire OpenRCX as the RC back-end and/or improve the table engine → forkable P3 sub-goal; the *foundry numbers* stay external. ROADMAP §2.3 last row.
rows.feature_zh: 簽核級 3D field-solver 寄生
rows.notes_zh: 精度校準自加密的 foundry ITF/nxtgrd/QRC-tech = EXTERNAL。RC 引擎可 fork：把 OpenRCX 接為 RC 後端，並/或改進表格引擎 → 可 fork 的 P3 子目標；而 foundry 數據仍屬 external。ROADMAP §2.3 最後一列。

rows.feature: Foundry-calibrated RC coefficients + PVT/corner RC
rows.notes: Encrypted foundry ITF. Where a PDK ships open R/C data, derive per-corner coefficients (partial, opportunistic); never present as certified.
rows.feature_zh: 經 foundry 校準的 RC 係數 + PVT/corner RC
rows.notes_zh: 加密的 foundry ITF。當 PDK 附帶開放的 R/C 資料時，可推導出逐 corner 係數（部分、機會性）；絕不宣稱為已認證。

rows.feature: EM / current-density-aware RC + temperature-dependent RC
rows.notes: Done as separate analysis (IR-drop / EM track), not inside magic PEX.
rows.feature_zh: EM / 電流密度感知 RC + 溫度相依 RC
rows.notes_zh: 作為獨立分析處理（IR-drop / EM 軌道），非在 magic PEX 內。

rows.feature: Runs PEX on custom PDK with no magic .tech
rows.notes: Today: WAIVED_TOOL_UNAVAILABLE when no .tech. Derive an extraction tech (layer R/C, coupling) from the PDK LEF + open data; the multi-metal bridge-tech generator (#46-adjacent, 5e805d5a) is the first step of exactly this. ROADMAP §2.3.
rows.feature_zh: 在沒有 magic .tech 的自訂 PDK 上執行 PEX
rows.notes_zh: 目前：沒有 .tech 時為 WAIVED_TOOL_UNAVAILABLE。需從 PDK LEF + 開放資料推導出一份萃取用 tech（layer R/C、耦合）；多金屬 bridge-tech 產生器（與 #46 相鄰，5e805d5a）正是這件事的第一步。ROADMAP §2.3。

rows.feature: GDS write — uncompressed + gzip-compressed
rows.notes: Core (calma/CalmaWrite.c, CalmaWriteZ.c).
rows.feature_zh: GDS 寫出——未壓縮 + gzip 壓縮
rows.notes_zh: 核心（calma/CalmaWrite.c、CalmaWriteZ.c）。

rows.feature: Native same-layer abutting-shape merge at write
rows.notes: Core magic strength — merges touching geometry across instance boundaries at write, unlike klayout DEF→GDS (which needs an explicit merge pass, ROADMAP §2.3). This is *why* the plugin prefers magic streamout.
rows.feature_zh: 寫出時原生的同層相鄰形狀合併
rows.notes_zh: magic 的核心強項——寫出時會跨 instance 邊界合併相接的幾何，不像 klayout DEF→GDS 需要一個明確的合併階段（ROADMAP §2.3）。這正是為何 plugin 偏好 magic streamout。

rows.feature: Vendor / read-only GDS passthrough (GDS_FILE property, hierarchical reuse)
rows.notes: Core.
rows.feature_zh: 廠商 / 唯讀 GDS 直通（GDS_FILE 屬性、階層式重用）
rows.notes_zh: 核心。

rows.feature: Vendor-GDS cell-rename corruption fix (name-length change, compressed + uncompressed)
rows.notes: 443045b3 (Fable 5): renamed cell vs GDS_FILE structure name of different length corrupted read-only GDS passthrough; fixed for all name-change scenarios, both CalmaWrite.c + CalmaWriteZ.c.
rows.feature_zh: 廠商 GDS cell 更名損毀修正（名稱長度改變，壓縮 + 未壓縮）
rows.notes_zh: 443045b3（Fable 5）：更名後的 cell 與長度不同的 GDS_FILE 結構名稱會使唯讀 GDS 直通損毀；已針對所有名稱變更情境修正，CalmaWrite.c 與 CalmaWriteZ.c 皆然。

rows.feature: Off-grid vertex snap to MANUFACTURINGGRID at write
rows.notes: Off-grid vertices from off-grid instance transforms even when routed DEF is on-grid (ROADMAP §2.3: 76% OFFGRID observed). Honor tech-LEF MANUFACTURINGGRID and snap cell vertices + instance displacements/array vectors at write. (Shared root cause with #47 at import.)
rows.feature_zh: 寫出時將偏離網格的頂點對齊到 MANUFACTURINGGRID
rows.notes_zh: 即使繞線後的 DEF 已在網格上，偏離網格的 instance 變換仍會產生偏離網格的頂點（ROADMAP §2.3：觀察到 76% OFFGRID）。遵循 tech-LEF 的 MANUFACTURINGGRID，於寫出時對齊 cell 頂點 + instance 位移/陣列向量。（與匯入端的 #47 為同一根因。）

rows.feature: CIF/GDS layer-map by tech → foundry-canonical GDS numbers
rows.notes: Ensure streamout emits foundry layer/datatype (e.g. met3 = 70/20) not compact numbering, so Magic-written GDS is round-trippable + LVS keeps routing/labels. Pairs with #46 (import side). ROADMAP §2.3.
rows.feature_zh: 依 tech 的 CIF/GDS layer-map → foundry 正規 GDS 編號
rows.notes_zh: 確保 streamout 輸出 foundry 的 layer/datatype（例如 met3 = 70/20）而非精簡編號，讓 Magic 寫出的 GDS 可往返轉換，且 LVS 保留繞線/標籤。與 #46（匯入端）搭配。ROADMAP §2.3。

rows.feature: LEF/DEF read → geometry + instances + pins
rows.notes: Core (lef/defRead.c, lefRead.c).
rows.feature_zh: LEF/DEF 讀取 → 幾何 + instance + pin
rows.notes_zh: 核心（lef/defRead.c、lefRead.c）。

rows.feature: Unknown-layer route retain (not drop + not desync parser)
rows.notes: 3f776537: DefAddRoutes dropped an unmapped-layer route (continue) and desynced the SPECIALNET width→via parser; now retains geometry on TT_TECHDEPBASE + warns. Known-layer DEF byte-identical (0 regress).
rows.feature_zh: 保留未知層繞線（不丟棄且不使解析器失步）
rows.notes_zh: 3f776537：DefAddRoutes 原本會丟棄未對應層的繞線（continue），並使 SPECIALNET 的 width→via 解析器失步；現在會將幾何保留在 TT_TECHDEPBASE 上並發出警告。已知層的 DEF byte-identical（零回歸）。

rows.feature: NDR / unresolvable-via retain (real adjacent-layer tech contact)
rows.notes: 5aea4c24 (A): an unresolved via name silently opened the metal; now retains the adjacent-layer contact (via up, fallback down) + warns. Extraction node count 2→1 (open→connected).
rows.feature_zh: 保留 NDR / 無法解析的 via（真實的相鄰層 tech contact）
rows.notes_zh: 5aea4c24（A）：無法解析的 via 名稱會靜默地使金屬開路；現在會保留相鄰層 contact（優先向上取 via，退回向下）並發出警告。萃取節點數 2→1（開路→連通）。

rows.feature: Zero-width route guard — guarantee non-zero DEF route width (fixes LEF-abstract net-collapse)
rows.notes: 8d7b0669: when a routing layer's width resolved to 0 (tech-LEF WIDTH never read + no DRC width rule), the wire built as an EMPTY rect and was dropped → top extraction collapsed N nets into 1 node. Now floors route width. This was the "LEF-abstract collapses N nets → 1" residual.
rows.feature_zh: 零寬度繞線防護——保證 DEF 繞線寬度非零（修正 LEF-abstract 的 net 塌縮）
rows.notes_zh: 8d7b0669：當繞線層寬度被解析為 0（tech-LEF WIDTH 未讀取 + 無 DRC 寬度規則）時，該線會被建成空矩形並被丟棄 → 頂層萃取把 N 個 net 塌縮成 1 個節點。現在會為繞線寬度設下限。這即是「LEF-abstract 把 N 個 net 塌縮成 1」的殘留問題。

rows.feature: def-read hang guard — zero default-width DEF-pin font-label loop
rows.notes: 443eb4b6 #1: while ((size<<1)<height) size<<=1; spun forever when DRCGetDefaultLayerWidth()=0 (100% CPU on a single pin over a metal-only tech). Both pin sites now floor size at 1 (mirrors CalmaRdpt.c:808). Part of the crash/hang/startup trio.
rows.feature_zh: def-read 掛起防護——零預設寬度 DEF-pin 字型標籤迴圈
rows.notes_zh: 443eb4b6 #1：while ((size<<1)<height) size<<=1; 在 DRCGetDefaultLayerWidth()=0 時會無限旋轉（在僅有金屬的 tech 上，單一 pin 就吃滿 100% CPU）。兩處 pin 現在都把 size 下限設為 1（比照 CalmaRdpt.c:808）。屬 crash/hang/startup 三連修之一。

rows.feature: CAD_ROOT self-seed in -dnull -noconsole batch startup
rows.notes: 443eb4b6 #3 (tcltk/magic.tcl.in): batch path never applied CAD_ROOT_DEFAULT → startup-tech search resolved to /magic/sys, failed minimum.tech, aborted init (rc=0, extracted nothing). Now self-sufficient; env-provided CAD_ROOT still wins. Part of the crash/hang/startup trio.
rows.feature_zh: 在 -dnull -noconsole 批次啟動中自行設定 CAD_ROOT
rows.notes_zh: 443eb4b6 #3（tcltk/magic.tcl.in）：批次路徑從未套用 CAD_ROOT_DEFAULT → 啟動 tech 搜尋落到 /magic/sys，找不到 minimum.tech，導致初始化中止（rc=0，什麼都沒萃取）。現在可自給自足；由環境變數提供的 CAD_ROOT 仍優先。屬 crash/hang/startup 三連修之一。

rows.feature: Multi-metal LEF-abstract bridge-tech reconstruction (full metal-stack connectivity)
rows.notes: 5e805d5a: test/lvs_bridge_tech_multimetal/ + gen_bridge_tech.py — chip/PDK-AGNOSTIC generator derives the ordered routing/cut stack straight from the tech-LEF LAYER set and models every metal + every metalN metal(N+1) contact rule, so nets that route UP the stack are preserved (not fragmented). Proves the commercial-PDK case (LEF+GDS+deck, no native magic tech).
rows.feature_zh: 多金屬 LEF-abstract bridge-tech 重建（完整金屬堆疊連通性）
rows.notes_zh: 5e805d5a：test/lvs_bridge_tech_multimetal/ + gen_bridge_tech.py——與晶片/PDK 無關的產生器，直接從 tech-LEF 的 LAYER 集合推導出有序的 routing/cut 堆疊，並為每一層 metal 與每一組 metalN–metal(N+1) contact 規則建模，使沿堆疊向上繞線的 net 得以保留（不被切碎）。已在商用 PDK 情境（LEF+GDS+deck，無原生 magic tech）中驗證。

rows.feature: Foundry LEF/DEF layer-map auto-discovery + apply
rows.notes: Auto-discover the PDK's foundry LEF/DEF map (or derive GDS layer/datatype from tech-LEF layer names) instead of compact fallback. Highest value÷effort: without it, bare-DEF import assigns compact numbers, Magic-written GDS is unreadable, LVS loses all top routing + pin labels. Complements the bridge-tech generator (#45). ROADMAP §2.3.
rows.feature_zh: foundry LEF/DEF layer-map 自動探索 + 套用
rows.notes_zh: 自動探索 PDK 的 foundry LEF/DEF 對應（或從 tech-LEF layer 名稱推導 GDS layer/datatype），取代精簡退回機制。價值÷工作量最高：若沒有它，裸 DEF 匯入會指派精簡編號、Magic 寫出的 GDS 無法讀取、LVS 遺失所有頂層繞線 + pin 標籤。與 bridge-tech 產生器（#45）互補。ROADMAP §2.3。

rows.feature: Off-grid instance-placement snap at DEF import
rows.notes: Honor tech-LEF MANUFACTURINGGRID on instance displacement/array vectors + via/enclosure coords at import (currently only DBU grid enforced). Same root cause as #37 (streamout side).
rows.feature_zh: DEF 匯入時偏離網格的 instance 擺放對齊
rows.notes_zh: 匯入時對 instance 位移/陣列向量 + via/enclosure 座標遵循 tech-LEF 的 MANUFACTURINGGRID（目前僅強制 DBU 網格）。與 #37（streamout 端）同一根因。

rows.feature: Full NONDEFAULTRULES block parse + vias-by-rule instantiate
rows.notes: We already retain NDR *via geometry* (#41); the remaining gap is parsing the NONDEFAULTRULES section + VIA…BY RULE references so OpenROAD CTS NDR segments (M1M2_PR, L1M1_PR_MR) are fully instanced rather than dropped. Closes the spm net-level LVS interop artifact. ROADMAP §2.3.
rows.feature_zh: 完整解析 NONDEFAULTRULES 區塊 + 依規則實例化 via
rows.notes_zh: 我們已保留 NDR 的 via 幾何（#41）；剩下的缺口是解析 NONDEFAULTRULES 區段 + VIA…BY RULE 參照，讓 OpenROAD CTS 的 NDR 線段（M1M2_PR、L1M1_PR_MR）能被完整實例化而非被丟棄。可消除 spm 在 net 層級的 LVS 互通瑕疵。ROADMAP §2.3。

rows.feature: Hierarchical corner-stitched DB (edit + DRC + extract + GDS all hierarchical)
rows.notes: Core; the substrate of every capability above.
rows.feature_zh: 階層式 corner-stitched 資料庫（編輯 + DRC + 萃取 + GDS 全部階層化）
rows.notes_zh: 核心；上述每項能力的底層基礎。

rows.feature: flatten / getcell / expand / cell-context ops
rows.notes: Core.
rows.feature_zh: flatten / getcell / expand / cell-context 運算
rows.notes_zh: 核心。

rows.feature: Vacuous-output self-detection (0-byte GDS, unknown-layer flood, 0-cell result)
rows.notes: Implemented plugin-side (_detect_vacuous_magic / drc_vacuous_pass_check refuse a 0-violation result with layer errors and flip to INCONCLUSIVE). Fork-side robustness now largely removes the *cause* (#40/#42/#46). Keep the detector as belt-and-suspenders.
rows.feature_zh: 空洞輸出自我偵測（0 位元組 GDS、未知層洪流、0-cell 結果）
rows.notes_zh: 於 plugin 端實作（_detect_vacuous_magic / drc_vacuous_pass_check 會拒絕「零違規但有層錯誤」的結果並翻為 INCONCLUSIVE）。fork 端的穩健性現已大致消除根因（#40/#42/#46）。保留此偵測器作為雙重保險。

rows.feature: Tiled multi-threaded batch DRC / ext2spice
rows.notes: magic DRC (drc/DRC*.c) and extraction run single-threaded on global mutable tile-plane state; the only threads in the tree are X11 GUI helpers (grX11thread.c). Full-chip batch DRC could in principle be tiled + threaded, but the codebase is deep global-mutable, Tcl-bound C where threading is high-risk — and our production signoff-DRC path is the already-threaded KLayout SVRF engine, so parallelizing magic DRC is low-ROI. Defer.
rows.feature_zh: 分塊多執行緒批次 DRC／ext2spice
rows.notes_zh: magic DRC（drc/DRC*.c）與萃取都在全域可變 tile-plane 狀態上單執行緒執行；樹內唯一的 thread 是 X11 GUI 輔助（grX11thread.c）。全晶片批次 DRC 原則上可分塊＋多執行緒，但程式碼是深度全域可變、綁 Tcl 的 C，加執行緒高風險——且我們的簽核 DRC 路徑是已平行化的 KLayout SVRF 引擎，故平行化 magic DRC 屬低回報。Defer。

magic.summary_zh: 批次 GDS streamout + 元件/RC 萃取 + LVS 前置 netlist 產生 + 編輯期 DRC。完整 DEF 保真匯入路徑已落地（unknown-layer/NDR-via/zero-width 防護、crash/hang 三連修、bridge-tech）；最重要的未完項目是 foundry LEF/DEF layer-map 自動探索，其次是 SPEF/DSPF 寫出器。

netgen.summary: LVS netlist comparison (connectivity-graph isomorphism). Interior match, property tolerance, hierarchy and global reconciliation are solid; the highest-leverage open item is a structured JSON report (kills the text-scrape false-PASS class), then short/open localization and a PERC-lite ERC pass.

rows.feature: Connectivity-graph partition-refinement isomorphism (naming-robust interior match)
rows.notes: Iterate() + ElementHash/NodeHash + NodeClass/ElementClass refinement (netcmp.c:4124-4600). This is the load-bearing capability — the roadmap "seeded by name" note applies only to the top anchor (A7), not the interior.
rows.feature_zh: 連接性圖 partition-refinement 同構（對命名穩健的內部比對）
rows.notes_zh: Iterate() + ElementHash/NodeHash + NodeClass/ElementClass 精化（netcmp.c:4124-4600）。這是承載核心的能力——roadmap 中「以名稱起始」的註記僅適用於頂層錨點（A7），不適用於內部。

rows.feature: Pin-permutation equivalence (commutative device terminals, permutable groups)
rows.notes: PermuteSetup/PermuteForget (netcmp.c:6867); permutation cross-check bug fixed upstream 2ee286e.
rows.feature_zh: Pin 排列等價（可交換的元件端點、可排列群組）
rows.notes_zh: PermuteSetup/PermuteForget（netcmp.c:6867）；排列交叉檢查 bug 已於上游 2ee286e 修正。

rows.feature: Automorphism resolution (symmetric-net tie-break by pin)
rows.notes: ResolveAutomorphsByPin (netcmp.c:6611), PrintAutomorphisms.
rows.feature_zh: 自同構解析（以 pin 對對稱 net 進行決勝）
rows.notes_zh: ResolveAutomorphsByPin（netcmp.c:6611）、PrintAutomorphisms。

rows.feature: Series/parallel device merging before compare
rows.notes: CombineParallel/CombineSeries (netcmp.c:2536-2728).
rows.feature_zh: 比對前的串聯/並聯元件合併
rows.notes_zh: CombineParallel/CombineSeries（netcmp.c:2536-2728）。

rows.feature: Verdict line reflects transistor-property errors (no silent false-PASS)
rows.notes: Final result: now prints ... do NOT match uniquely (property errors present); killed R=1k-vs-2k silent-pass. FIX_STATUS-proven.
rows.feature_zh: 判定行反映電晶體屬性錯誤（無靜默誤判 PASS）
rows.notes_zh: Final result：現在會印出 ... do NOT match uniquely（存在屬性錯誤）；已消除 R=1k-對-2k 的靜默通過。已經 FIX_STATUS 驗證。

rows.feature: Portless-top false-PASS guard (netgen::ports -count non-proxy)
rows.commercial: Calibre won't emit CORRECT with no ports to anchor
rows.notes: portless .subckt → explicit non-match instead of vacuous "match uniquely". Negative control holds.
rows.feature_zh: 無埠頂層的誤判 PASS 防護（netgen::ports -count 非 proxy）
rows.notes_zh: 無埠 .subckt → 明確判定不相符，而非空洞的「match uniquely」。負向對照成立。

rows.feature: Connectivity top-partition anchoring — RECOVER a match for a portless / auto-named (a_NNNN#) top by seeding the partition from a unique device-fingerprint, not ports/names
rows.commercial: Calibre matches top by graph isomorphism, robust to a portless/renamed top
rows.notes: Complement to A6: today the guard only *refuses*. Add a graph-seed fallback — pick a maximally-distinguishing device class (rarest ElementHash bucket) as the partition anchor when no port anchor exists, then let Iterate() converge. Gate hard: only accept if convergence is UNIQUE (single automorphism orbit) else stay refused. Roadmap §2.4 "strengthen partition seed to use device-terminal connectivity".
rows.feature_zh: 連接性頂層 partition 錨定——以獨特的元件指紋（而非埠/名稱）起始 partition，為無埠 / 自動命名（a_NNNN#）的頂層救回一個相符判定
rows.notes_zh: 與 A6 互補：目前防護只會拒絕。新增以圖為種子的 fallback——當不存在埠錨點時，挑選最具區辨力的元件類別（最稀有的 ElementHash 桶）作為 partition 錨點，再讓 Iterate() 收斂。嚴格把關：僅在收斂為 UNIQUE（單一 automorphism 軌道）時才接受，否則維持拒絕。Roadmap §2.4「強化 partition 種子以使用元件端點連接性」。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD DEFERRED] NOT a refinement engine -- that exists. Missing is exactly two things: (i) an INITIAL SEED for the partition when no port anchor exists, and (ii) a uniqueness ACCEPTANCE test. See finding 'A7-rescope' for the verified evidence that base/netcmp.c NodeHash()/ElementHash()/Iterate() already implement Weisfeiler-Leman colour refinement over per-net device-terminal histograms and net degree. | It is th

rows.feature: Black-box / abstract leaf-cell match (.subckt defined one side, instanced-only other side) — positional
rows.commercial: Calibre treats undefined leaf as matched black-box by name+pins
rows.notes: CELL_PLACEHOLDER positional pin pairing when port counts agree; fixed &&→& mask typo. 3-pin-vs-4-pin negative control still fails.
rows.feature_zh: 黑箱 / 抽象葉單元比對（一側定義 .subckt、另一側僅實例化）——依位置
rows.notes_zh: 當埠數一致時以 CELL_PLACEHOLDER 依位置配對 pin；已修正 &&→& 的遮罩筆誤。3-pin-對-4-pin 的負向對照仍會失敗。

rows.feature: Black-box match by pin-NAME (not just position) + LEF-abstract pin-order awareness
rows.commercial: Calibre/ICV abstract cell matching by pin name
rows.notes: Extend A8: when both sides carry pin names, pair by name first, fall back to position. Removes the "correct cell, shuffled LEF pin order → false mismatch" class for hardmacro/abstract integration.
rows.feature_zh: 以 pin 名稱（而非僅位置）進行黑箱比對 + LEF-abstract pin 順序感知
rows.notes_zh: 延伸 A8：當兩側皆帶 pin 名稱時，先以名稱配對、再退回位置。消除 hardmacro/abstract 整合中「單元正確、但 LEF pin 順序被打亂 → 誤判不相符」的類別。
rows.reclass_note: ROW PREMISE DOES NOT HOLD — The false-mismatch class does not reproduce on the current fork. Four probes, all already correct BEFORE any change: (P1) body-less `.subckt bb A B C` vs declared order `C A B` with the instance reordered -> MATCH, and the pin table pairs A|A B|B C|C, not A|C -- i.e. netgen already pairs by NAME. (P2) asymmetric case, real body on one side vs body-less on the other, shuffled order -> MATCH by name

rows.feature: Swapped-net / near-miss disambiguation output (which candidate the matcher rejected and why)
rows.notes: On a failed converge, emit the top-N nearest NodeClass collisions so triage sees *why* two nets didn't correspond (fanout-vector diff), not just "failed pin matching".
rows.feature_zh: 交換 net / near-miss 的釐清輸出（比對器拒絕了哪個候選、以及原因）
rows.notes_zh: 在收斂失敗時，輸出最接近的 top-N 個 NodeClass 碰撞，讓 triage 看到兩條 net 為何無法對應（fanout 向量差異），而不只是「failed pin matching」。

rows.feature: Hierarchical compare with flatten prohibit / -noflatten (compare cell-by-cell, don't flatten)
rows.notes: bottomup.c; -noflatten/flatten prohibit fixed upstream (72d7d55, b371af9 — was an infinite-loop / wrong-cell-flagged bug).
rows.feature_zh: 具攤平禁止 / -noflatten 的階層比對（逐單元比對、不攤平）
rows.notes_zh: bottomup.c；-noflatten/flatten prohibit 已於上游修正（72d7d55、b371af9——原為無窮迴圈 / 標錯單元的 bug）。

rows.feature: Selective flatten of only unmatched cells (FlattenUnmatched)
rows.notes: netcmp.c:3572 — flatten only the sub-tree that failed, keep matched cells hierarchical.
rows.feature_zh: 僅對未相符單元選擇性攤平（FlattenUnmatched）
rows.notes_zh: netcmp.c:3572——僅攤平失敗的子樹，保留已相符單元的階層。

rows.feature: Cell correspondence when names differ — match subcircuits across the two hierarchies by internal-content hash, not by cell name
rows.commercial: Calibre auto-matches cells across naming; ICV cross-naming cell binding
rows.notes: Today LookupPrematchedClass/lookupclass (netcmp.c:3131-3175) key on name. Add a content-fingerprint (sorted device-class histogram + port-count) so wrapper_A ↔ wrapper_B bind when isomorphic. Gate: unique fingerprint only, else fall back to flatten.
rows.feature_zh: 名稱不同時的單元對應——以內部內容雜湊（而非單元名稱）在兩層級間比對子電路
rows.notes_zh: 目前 LookupPrematchedClass/lookupclass（netcmp.c:3131-3175）以名稱為鍵。新增內容指紋（排序後的元件類別直方圖 + 埠數），使 wrapper_A ↔ wrapper_B 在同構時綁定。把關：僅限唯一指紋，否則退回攤平。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD DEFERRED] A CONTENT fingerprint for a cell, plus a uniqueness gate and a fallback. Observed in source: cell binding is name-keyed -- EquivalenceClasses() propagates classhash by setting the second cell's classhash from the first, i.e. classhash is a name-equivalence token, not a value derived from cell CONTENTS. So a content fingerprint (sorted device-class histogram + port count, per the row) has to be bui

rows.feature: Device/dummy filtering hooks (drop dummy caps, series-R, antenna diodes before compare)
rows.commercial: Calibre DEVICE/filter statements, ICV device filtering
rows.notes: Generalize the existing ad-hoc "drop 2 filler decaps" plugin shim into a netgen ignore class <cell> / filter series R < Rmin directive so it's declared, not hand-edited per design. ignore command already exists (tclnetgen.c:223) — extend to property-predicated filtering.
rows.feature_zh: 元件/dummy 過濾掛鉤（比對前移除 dummy 電容、串聯 R、antenna 二極體）
rows.notes_zh: 將現有臨時性的「移除 2 個 filler decap」plugin 墊片，推廣為 netgen 的 ignore class <cell> / filter series R < Rmin 指令，使其為宣告式、而非每個設計手動編輯。ignore 指令已存在（tclnetgen.c:223）——擴充為以屬性為條件的過濾。

rows.feature: Connectivity-based global correspondence — accept a renamed global (VDD↔VPWR) when device-terminal fanout is isomorphic
rows.commercial: Calibre reconciles power by connectivity graph, not exact global name
rows.notes: PORT_GLOBAL flag (objlist.h) set at the single ConvertGlobals promotion site (flatten.c); MatchPins accepts name-differing globals ONLY when both carry the flag AND already sit in the same connectivity-corresponded NodeClass. Proven-negative: non-isomorphic power fanout → still MISMATCH (no leak). Closes roadmap §2.4 "matches globals only by name".
rows.feature_zh: 基於連接性的 global 對應——當元件端點 fanout 同構時，接受被改名的 global（VDD↔VPWR）
rows.notes_zh: PORT_GLOBAL 旗標（objlist.h）於唯一的 ConvertGlobals 提升點（flatten.c）設定；MatchPins 僅在兩者皆帶該旗標且已位於同一連接性對應的 NodeClass 時，才接受名稱不同的 global。已驗證負向：電源 fanout 不同構 → 仍為 MISMATCH（不漏判）。收斂 roadmap §2.4「global 僅以名稱比對」。

rows.feature: -auto-global — harvest every .global/*.GLOBAL from EITHER netlist, promote to global in BOTH
rows.notes: Lets a Magic ext2spice netlist (no .global) match a schematic that declares .global VPWR VGND. Netlist-derived → design-agnostic, no PDK list baked in.
rows.feature_zh: -auto-global——從任一 netlist 蒐集所有 .global/*.GLOBAL，並在兩側皆提升為 global
rows.notes_zh: 讓 Magic ext2spice 產生的 netlist（無 .global）能與宣告 .global VPWR VGND 的 schematic 相符。由 netlist 推導 → 與設計無關、不內建 PDK 清單。

rows.feature: -nopower="…" — force caller-named PG nets to global scope (std-cell PG as implicitly-connected globals)
rows.notes: Reconciles a logic-only post-PnR Verilog netlist (grep VPWR=0) vs a power-carrying layout. Closes roadmap §2.4 "logic-only netlist vs power-carrying layout".
rows.feature_zh: -nopower——強制將呼叫端指定的 PG net 設為 global 範圍（將標準單元 PG 視為隱含連接的 global）
rows.notes_zh: 對帳僅含邏輯的 post-PnR Verilog netlist（grep VPWR=0）與帶電源的 layout。收斂 roadmap §2.4「僅含邏輯的 netlist 對帶電源的 layout」。

rows.feature: Derive globals from Liberty PG-pin declarations (not just .global)
rows.commercial: Calibre reconstructs power from PG-pin / text
rows.notes: Roadmap §2.4 lists "or Liberty PG-pin declarations" alongside .global. Emitter-side today; make netgen (or the lvs proc) read pg_pin groups from a supplied .lib and auto--nopower them. Removes the hand-maintained per-PDK power list.
rows.feature_zh: 從 Liberty PG-pin 宣告推導 global（不只 .global）
rows.notes_zh: Roadmap §2.4 將「或 Liberty PG-pin 宣告」與 .global 並列。目前在 emitter 端；讓 netgen（或 lvs proc）從提供的 .lib 讀取 pg_pin 群組並自動 --nopower。移除手動維護的 per-PDK 電源清單。

rows.feature: Multi-power-domain / level-shifter-aware global handling (>1 VDD, isolation/LS boundary nets)
rows.commercial: Calibre PERC + UPF-aware LVS, multi-supply domains
rows.notes: C1-C3 assume one PG pair. Extend PORT_GLOBAL to carry a domain tag; allow N global pairs and treat level-shifter/isolation cells as legal domain-crossing (don't demand isomorphic fanout across the boundary). Needed for any real multi-VDD SoC.
rows.feature_zh: 多電源域 / level-shifter 感知的 global 處理（>1 個 VDD、isolation/LS 邊界 net）
rows.notes_zh: C1-C3 假設只有一組 PG。擴充 PORT_GLOBAL 以攜帶 domain 標籤；允許 N 組 global，並將 level-shifter/isolation 單元視為合法的跨域（不要求跨邊界的 fanout 同構）。任何真實的 multi-VDD SoC 皆需要。
rows.reclass_note: [GENUINELY-OPEN-but-NOT-A-FORK-PATCH] Investigated with 5 AUP-clean multi-domain proven-negatives (generic nmos/pmos): the current fork ALREADY satisfies every one WITHOUT change — correct multi-VDD+level-shifter MATCH; boundary miswire (count-changing) MISMATCH; count-PRESERVING domain miswire MISMATCH (globals still correspond); swapped symmetric supplies with named-port anchors MISMATCH; consistent crossed rename MATCH. So the connectivity-LVS half has NO reproducer — a cross-domain cell already breaks inter-domain symmetry and the existing WL refinement resolves each supply to its own class. Relaxing with no failing case is the A9 unjustified-widening the campaign twice declined. Real C5 = a UPF-style domain DECLARATION mechanism (netgen cannot infer it) + the F3 PERC checks that consume it = a fresh feature stack, not a fork LVS patch. A proven-negative for the tag alone would be VACUOUS (echoes the constraint).

rows.area: Device-property checks (W / L / M / area / perimeter)
rows.feature: Per-property tolerance (property … tolerance) with absolute slop + relative ddiff
rows.notes: tclnetgen.c:3434 tolerance sub-command; netcmp.c:4253-4275 smax=fmax(s1->slop,s2->slop), relative ddiff=fabs(Δ)/fabs(Σ). W/L/M/value tolerance is real, not missing.
rows.feature_zh: 各屬性容差（property … tolerance），含絕對 slop + 相對 ddiff
rows.notes_zh: tclnetgen.c:3434 tolerance 子指令；netcmp.c:4253-4275 smax=fmax(s1->slop,s2->slop)、相對 ddiff=fabs(Δ)/fabs(Σ)。W/L/M/value 容差為真實存在，並非缺漏。

rows.area: Device-property checks (W / L / M / area / perimeter)
rows.feature: Critical-property series/parallel combine (W adds in parallel at const L, etc.); area/perimeter derived from W×L
rows.notes: PropertySortAndCombine/PropertyOptimize (netcmp.c:4639-5426); DeriveArea/PerimeterProperty (:8835). Cap area+perimeter both-additive fixed upstream b59196f/0bee21c.
rows.feature_zh: 關鍵屬性的串聯/並聯合併（L 固定時 W 於並聯相加等）；面積/周長由 W×L 推導
rows.notes_zh: PropertySortAndCombine/PropertyOptimize（netcmp.c:4639-5426）；DeriveArea/PerimeterProperty（:8835）。電容的面積+周長皆為可加性，已於上游 b59196f/0bee21c 修正。

rows.area: Device-property checks (W / L / M / area / perimeter)
rows.feature: Property-error reporting is authoritative over "match uniquely"
rows.commercial: Calibre INCORRECT on any param error
rows.notes: See A5 — the same verdict-honesty fix.
rows.feature_zh: 屬性錯誤回報優先於「match uniquely」
rows.notes_zh: 見 A5——同一個判定誠實性修正。

rows.area: Device-property checks (W / L / M / area / perimeter)
rows.feature: Auto-tolerance from PDK (default %-tolerance per device class, foundry-typical) + M/finger normalization defaults
rows.notes: Today the caller must set every property tolerance. Add a -pdk-tol <file> (or sane built-in defaults: e.g. R/C ±X%, W/L ±grid) so a bare lvs gives foundry-reasonable tolerance without hand-tuning. Chip-agnostic defaults only; no NDA numbers.
rows.feature_zh: 由 PDK 自動設定容差（各元件類別的預設 %-容差，foundry 典型值）+ M/finger 正規化預設值
rows.notes_zh: 目前呼叫端必須設定每個屬性容差。新增 -pdk-tol <file>（或合理的內建預設：例如 R/C ±X%、W/L ±grid），使裸 lvs 即可得到 foundry 合理的容差而無須手動調參。僅限與晶片無關的預設值；不含 NDA 數字。
rows.done_note: [ALREADY-COVERED upstream] Upstream netgen ALREADY derives the per-device %-tolerance from the PDK. Full chain, verified in-tree: (1) The open PDK ships per-device tolerance in its netgen setup file as `property "-circuit1 $dev" tolerance {l 0.01} {w 0.01}` / `{area 0.02}` statements -- confirmed in sky130A_setup.tcl (lines 58,71,150,159,184,192,212,220) AND in gf180mcuC/D_setup.tcl (

rows.area: Device-property checks (W / L / M / area / perimeter)
rows.feature: Mismatch-magnitude ranking — sort property mismatches by|Δ|/ %, flag the worst offenders
rows.notes: PropertyCheckMismatch (netcmp.c:5513) has the numbers; emit them ranked + structured (feeds E1). Turns "property error" into "M17 W off 40%".
rows.feature_zh: 不相符幅度排序——依 |Δ|/% 排序屬性不相符、標示最嚴重者
rows.notes_zh: PropertyCheckMismatch（netcmp.c:5513）已有數值；以排序 + 結構化方式輸出（供 E1 使用）。將「property error」轉為「M17 W 偏差 40%」。

rows.feature: Structured machine-readable LVS report (JSON) — verdict, per-cell match/mismatch, unmatched nets/devices, property deltas
rows.commercial: Calibre RVE/results-DB, ICV VUE DB, Pegasus results DB
rows.notes: netgen is text-only (grep -i json = 0 hits). The plugin currently regex-scrapes Final result: (lvs_verdict_tokens) — fragile, and the whole reason A5/A6 verdict fixes were needed. Add lvs … -json <file> emitting {verdict, cells:[{name,match,unmatched_nets,unmatched_devs,property_errors:[…]}]}. Highest value ÷ effort — kills the text-scrape class across lvs-triage/lvs_verdict_tokens/lvs_signoff_guard and makes false-PASS impossible to mis-parse.
rows.feature_zh: 結構化、機器可讀的 LVS 報告（JSON）——判定、各單元相符/不相符、未相符 net/元件、屬性差值
rows.notes_zh: netgen 僅有文字輸出（grep -i json = 0 命中）。plugin 目前以 regex 擷取 Final result:（lvs_verdict_tokens）——脆弱，也正是需要 A5/A6 判定修正的根本原因。新增 lvs … -json <file>，輸出 {verdict, cells:[{name,match,unmatched_nets,unmatched_devs,property_errors:[…]}]}。效益÷投入最高——消除 lvs-triage/lvs_verdict_tokens/lvs_signoff_guard 的 text-scrape 類別，並使誤判 PASS 無從被錯誤解析。

rows.feature: Machine-readable summary counts (unmatched nets/devices/pins, per side)
rows.notes: Subset of E1; can ship first. summary command exists (tclnetgen.c:225) — add a -json/-list structured emitter.
rows.feature_zh: 機器可讀的摘要計數（各側未相符 net/元件/pin）
rows.notes_zh: E1 的子集；可先出貨。summary 指令已存在（tclnetgen.c:225）——新增 -json/-list 結構化輸出器。

rows.feature: Disconnected-pin / port-mismatch surfaced in output (not silently hidden)
rows.notes: Multiple upstream fixes: black-box mismatched-pin reporting (0e958bd), port-vs-internal permutation port error (6e6e9fb), property-error-under-port-error (0bee21c). Baseline is solid; E1 makes it parseable.
rows.feature_zh: 斷接 pin / 埠不相符顯示於輸出（不靜默隱藏）
rows.notes_zh: 多項上游修正：黑箱不相符 pin 回報（0e958bd）、埠對內部排列的埠錯誤（6e6e9fb）、埠錯誤下的屬性錯誤（0bee21c）。基準已穩固；E1 使其可解析。

rows.feature: SVRFDRC_DEBUG-style "why did the partition collapse" diagnostic dump
rows.commercial: ICV VUE / Pegasus DRE interactive debug
rows.notes: Mirror the svrf-drc observability win: a NETCMP_DEBUG=1 that names, per refinement iteration, which NodeClass split/failed to split and the fanout vector that separated two near-matched nets. Diagnosis of these blind costs hours today (see A10).
rows.feature_zh: SVRFDRC_DEBUG 風格的「partition 為何塌陷」診斷傾印
rows.notes_zh: 比照 svrf-drc 的可觀測性成果：以 NETCMP_DEBUG=1 逐次精化迭代標明哪個 NodeClass 分裂/未能分裂，以及區隔兩條 near-match net 的 fanout 向量。目前盲目診斷這些問題需耗時數小時（見 A10）。

rows.feature: Floating-net / floating-gate detection (net driven by nothing / gate with no path to a driver)
rows.notes: netgen has the full connectivity graph already built — a floating gate is a MOS gate terminal on a net with no source/drain/driver fanout. Add an erc floating pass over the objlist. First member of a PERC-lite class; chip-agnostic topological check.
rows.feature_zh: 浮接 net / 浮接 gate 偵測（無任何驅動的 net / 無路徑通往 driver 的 gate）
rows.notes_zh: netgen 已建好完整連接性圖——浮接 gate 即 MOS gate 端點所在的 net 無任何 source/drain/driver fanout。在 objlist 上新增 erc floating pass。PERC-lite 類別的第一個成員；與晶片無關的拓樸檢查。

rows.feature: Missing well-tie / substrate-tie (bulk terminal not connected to a power/ground net)
rows.notes: The plugin already hand-normalizes NMOS.B→VSS / PMOS.B→VDD (the KLayout-LVS "bulk-normalize" trio). Turn that into a netgen erc welltie check: flag any device body not tied to a global rail. Directly productizes an existing manual step.
rows.feature_zh: 缺少 well-tie / substrate-tie（bulk 端點未連接到 power/ground net）
rows.notes_zh: plugin 已手動正規化 NMOS.B→VSS / PMOS.B→VDD（KLayout-LVS 的「bulk-normalize」三件組）。將其轉為 netgen 的 erc welltie 檢查：標示任何未接到 global rail 的元件 body。直接將既有手動步驟產品化。

rows.feature: High-voltage / cross-domain device-topology checks (thick-ox device on a HV net, gate-oxide reliability, domain-crossing without LS)
rows.notes: Needs device-terminal voltage-domain propagation (from C5 domain tags). Real PERC territory; published techniques exist. Build after C5 + F1/F2 land.
rows.feature_zh: 高壓 / 跨域元件拓樸檢查（HV net 上的厚氧化層元件、gate-oxide 可靠度、未經 LS 的跨域）
rows.notes_zh: 需要元件端點的電壓域傳遞（來自 C5 的 domain 標籤）。屬真正的 PERC 領域；已有公開技術。待 C5 + F1/F2 落地後再建置。
rows.reclass_note: [BLOCKED-ON-PREREQUISITE] PERC / design-intent feature needing external UPF-style domain input, not a connectivity fix. Not startable before the C5 declaration+tag mechanism exists.

rows.feature: ESD / antenna topological checks (ESD clamp presence, antenna-diode on long routes)
rows.notes: Topology-checkable in netgen, but antenna needs route-length (layout) data netgen doesn't hold → pairs with a Magic/KLayout geometric feed. Defer until F1-F3 prove the ERC pass framework.
rows.feature_zh: ESD / antenna 拓樸檢查（ESD clamp 是否存在、長繞線上的 antenna 二極體）
rows.notes_zh: 可在 netgen 中做拓樸檢查，但 antenna 需要 netgen 不持有的繞線長度（layout）資料 → 需搭配 Magic/KLayout 的幾何輸入。待 F1-F3 驗證 ERC pass 框架後再進行。

rows.area: Short / open localization (Calibre ShortFinder · ICV ShortFinder · Pegasus ISL)
rows.feature: Netlist-level short localization — when two schematic nets are merged into one in layout, name the device(s)/path that bridge them
rows.commercial: Calibre ShortFinder, ICV ShortFinder, Pegasus Interactive Shorts Locator
rows.notes: netgen sees the merged node and the two schematic nets that both map to it — it can trace + report the bridging device chain from the netlist alone (no geometry). Turns "Top level cell failed pin matching" into "net A and net B shorted through Mxx". High triage value.
rows.feature_zh: Netlist 層級的 short 定位——當兩條 schematic net 在 layout 中被併為一條時，指出橋接它們的元件/路徑
rows.notes_zh: netgen 看得到被併的節點以及都映射到它的兩條 schematic net——僅憑 netlist（無幾何）即可追蹤並回報橋接元件鏈。將「Top level cell failed pin matching」轉為「net A 與 net B 經由 Mxx 短路」。triage 價值高。

rows.area: Short / open localization (Calibre ShortFinder · ICV ShortFinder · Pegasus ISL)
rows.feature: Netlist-level open localization — when one schematic net splits into two in layout, report the split + the terminals stranded on each side
rows.notes: Dual of G1: one source net ↔ two layout nodes. Report both fragments' device fanout so the missing connection is obvious. Builds on the same corresponded-NodeClass data.
rows.feature_zh: Netlist 層級的 open 定位——當一條 schematic net 在 layout 中裂成兩條時，回報裂點 + 各側被孤立的端點
rows.notes_zh: G1 的對偶：一條來源 net ↔ 兩個 layout 節點。回報兩片段的元件 fanout，使缺失的連接一目了然。建立於相同的對應 NodeClass 資料之上。

rows.area: Short / open localization (Calibre ShortFinder · ICV ShortFinder · Pegasus ISL)
rows.feature: Geometric short highlighting in a layout viewer (draw the shorting polygon path)
rows.notes: netgen holds no layout database and no GUI — the geometric highlight belongs to Magic/KLayout, fed by G1's netlist-level device list. Not a netgen fork target (the netlist-level trace G1 is).
rows.feature_zh: 在 layout 檢視器中做幾何 short 高亮（繪出短路多邊形路徑）
rows.notes_zh: netgen 不持有 layout 資料庫也無 GUI——幾何高亮屬 Magic/KLayout，由 G1 的 netlist 層級元件清單餵入。並非 netgen fork 目標（netlist 層級的追蹤 G1 才是）。

rows.feature: Stronger hash (FNV-1a) + correct 2-value genhash
rows.notes: 21d329b SDBM→FNV-1a; 665203b genhash both-value fix. Fewer hash-collision false-splits on large designs.
rows.feature_zh: 更強的雜湊（FNV-1a）+ 正確的雙值 genhash
rows.notes_zh: 21d329b SDBM→FNV-1a；665203b genhash 雙值修正。在大型設計上減少因雜湊碰撞造成的誤分裂。

rows.feature: Hierarchical logic-injection (compare big matched cells without flattening; inject only the boundary) for CPU-class runtime
rows.commercial: Calibre nmLVS-H logic injection (2-3× faster), Pegasus stream processing
rows.notes: B1/B2 give hierarchical compare; the scale win is not flattening a matched-but-boundary-touched cell. Real engineering, bounded scope (our benchmark ICs are small — low urgency, hence P10).
rows.feature_zh: 階層式 logic-injection（不攤平即比對大型已相符單元；僅注入邊界）以達 CPU 等級執行時間
rows.notes_zh: B1/B2 提供階層比對；規模效益在於不攤平已相符但邊界被觸及的單元。屬真正的工程、範圍有界（我們的 benchmark IC 都小——急迫性低，故列 P10）。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD DEFERRED] A hierarchical compare driver that can inject only a matched cell's BOUNDARY instead of flattening it. Today netgen::lvs takes the opposite path: on a subcell mismatch it sets doFlatten and calls `netgen::flatten class` on both sides. There is no boundary-injection mechanism to extend.

rows.feature: Massively-parallel / multi-core distributed compare (2000+ cores)
rows.commercial: ICV distributed (2000+ CPU), Pegasus massive scalability
rows.notes: Infra-scale engineering aimed at billion-transistor SoCs; irrelevant to the plugin's small-IC scope. Honest external.
rows.feature_zh: 大規模平行 / 多核分散式比對（2000+ 核）
rows.notes_zh: 面向十億級電晶體 SoC 的基礎設施等級工程；與 plugin 的小型 IC 範疇無關。誠實標為 external。

rows.feature: Foundry-encrypted device-recognition rule decks
rows.notes: Device *recognition* is the extract side (Magic/KLayout/Calibre), not the netgen *compare* side; certified decks are licensed/encrypted foundry data a fork cannot ship. netgen compares whatever netlist it's fed — no change here.
rows.feature_zh: Foundry 加密的元件辨識規則 deck
rows.notes_zh: 元件辨識屬於 extract 端（Magic/KLayout/Calibre），而非 netgen 的比對端；認證 deck 為授權/加密的 foundry 資料，fork 無法出貨。netgen 只比對餵給它的 netlist——此處不需變更。

rows.feature: LVS graph-isomorphism matching kernel
rows.notes: netgen's LVS matching (base/netcmp.c) is an iterative partition-refinement graph-isomorphism fixpoint — each refinement pass depends on the previous, so it is inherently sequential and no threading is present or sensible in the kernel. Commercial LVS gets its parallelism from hierarchical cell partitioning, not from threading the matching kernel; netgen runs mostly flattened. Inherently serial — no fork work on the kernel.
rows.feature_zh: LVS 圖同構比對核心
rows.notes_zh: netgen 的 LVS 比對（base/netcmp.c）是迭代式 partition-refinement 圖同構定點——每輪 refinement 依賴上一輪，本質序列，核心內既無也不宜加執行緒。商用 LVS 的平行來自階層 cell 切割，而非把比對核心多執行緒化；netgen 多以攤平方式跑。本質序列——核心不做 fork 工作。

rows.feature: Hierarchical per-subcircuit parallel compare (process fan-out)
rows.notes: If a design were compared hierarchically, independent subcircuit comparisons could run in separate processes. But netgen lacks a clean hierarchical compare driver to emit those independent jobs, and on our block-level netlists the flat compare is already fast. High effort to add the hierarchical driver for small gain — defer.
rows.feature_zh: 階層式每子電路平行比對（process fan-out）
rows.notes_zh: 若採階層方式比對，各獨立子電路可分開 process 跑。但 netgen 缺乏乾淨的階層比對 driver 來產生這些獨立工作，且在我們的 block 級 netlist 上攤平比對已夠快。為小收益加階層 driver 成本高——defer。

rows.feature: Black-box vacuous-match — a no-flatten black box with ZERO corresponded pins is declared EQUIVALENT
rows.feature_zh: 黑箱空洞匹配 —— 一個不 flatten、零對應 pin 的黑箱被判定為等價
rows.commercial: Calibre nmLVS / IC Validator black-box handling
rows.notes: FIXED (commit b711fa5, branch vibeic/connectivity-match). ROOT CAUSE: MatchPins()'s black-box positional fallback (netcmp.c, added by b7d4138 for a legit defined-vs-instanced-stub case) paired still-uncovered ports by POSITION whenever counts agreed, with NO name check — so a black box whose two sides declare genuinely different REAL names (A B C vs X Y Z) got every pin silently covered, MatchPins returned result=1 on an EMPTY pin table -> 'Circuits match uniquely'. A vacuous false-clean, the same species as the verdict-wording leak. FIX (surgical, 30 lines): trust position ONLY when it is the sole signal — at least one side's pin i is a SYNTHETIC placeholder name ('1'..'N' from an instanced-undefined stub), OR the names correspond under matchfunc. When BOTH sides carry real, conflicting names, refuse the positional cover and set result=-1. A black box now matches only on POSITIVE evidence, never on the mere absence of a detected mismatch. GATE (JSON verdict authoritative): POS defined-vs-stub -> match (exercises the synthetic-pin path, so the gate can't pass by rejecting all black boxes); NEG-a A B C vs X Y Z -> mismatch; NEG-b A B C vs A B Z -> mismatch naming C/Z '(no matching pin)'. PROVEN-NEGATIVE same binary: WITHOUT the change the gate FAILS at NEG-a ('got match — VACUOUS FALSE-CLEAN LEAK') while POS still passes. 12/12 suite, 0 regressions.
rows.notes_zh: 一個帶重現案例的**真缺陷**（在退役 C5 時發現）：一個不 flatten、對應 pin 數為零的黑箱，目前被判定成乾淨 MATCH —— 空洞的 LVS 通過，與 verdict 字串洩漏同一種假清潔類別。可用 proven-negative 拿下：零/未匹配 pin 的黑箱絕不可回傳 MATCH。這是 netgen 最高價值的未認領項目，高於不可修的 C5。

netgen.summary_zh: LVS netlist 比對（連接性圖同構）。內部比對、屬性容差、階層與 global 對帳皆已穩固；效益最高的未完成項目是結構化 JSON 報告（消除 text-scrape 造成的誤判 PASS 類別），其次是 short/open 定位與 PERC-lite ERC pass。

areas_zh.Netlist compare (core graph-isomorphism: Netlist 比對（核心圖同構引擎）
areas_zh.Device-property checks (W / L / M / area: 元件屬性檢查（W / L / M / 面積 / 周長）
areas_zh.ERC / reliability (PERC-class — entirely: ERC / 可靠度（PERC 等級——目前完全缺乏）
areas_zh.Short / open localization (Calibre Short: Short / open 定位（Calibre ShortFinder · ICV ShortFinder · Pegasus ISL）
areas_zh.Performance / hierarchical-LVS scale: 效能 / 階層式 LVS 規模

klayout.summary: Signoff-geometry engine: native C++ SVRF/Calibre DRC engine, KLayout-native LVS, hardened LEF/DEF streamout, plus additive antenna-DRC and density metal-fill. Broad SVRF operator coverage; top forkable gaps are eqDRC, pattern-matching, waiver mgmt, RVE result DB and cumulative antenna (CAA).

rows.feature: Native C++ SVRF/Calibre .rule deck parser + engine (db::SVRFDeck + db::SVRFEngine) compiled into libklayout_bd, shipped as the svrfdrc CLI buddy — reads a foundry Calibre deck and solves every rule directly on KLayout's own db::Region/db::Edges/db::LayoutToNetlist. No transcoder, no .drc intermediate, no Python/Ruby interpreter.
rows.commercial: Calibre nmDRC SVRF engine [ALGO engine / EXT deck]
rows.notes: Byte-identical vs the retired Python ref on a real ~87k-line 180nm foundry deck (224 layers / 15,897 derivations / 4,533 rules → tally {'PASS':4523,'FAIL':10}) + 4 synthetic corpora. The vibeic-original signoff asset; C++11, /foss/tools/bin/svrfdrc.
rows.feature_zh: 原生 C++ SVRF/Calibre .rule deck 解析器與引擎（db::SVRFDeck + db::SVRFEngine），編譯進 libklayout_bd，以 svrfdrc CLI buddy 形式發布——直接讀入 foundry Calibre deck，並在 KLayout 自身的 db::Region/db::Edges/db::LayoutToNetlist 上求解每一條規則。無轉碼器、無 .drc 中介檔、無 Python/Ruby 直譯器。
rows.notes_zh: 在真實約 87k 行的 180nm foundry deck（224 層 / 15,897 個推導 / 4,533 條規則 → 統計 {'PASS':4523,'FAIL':10}）加上 4 組合成語料上，與已退役的 Python 參考實作 byte-identical。這是 vibeic 原創的簽核資產；C++11，/foss/tools/bin/svrfdrc。

rows.feature: SVRF/Calibre preprocessor — #DEFINE/#IFDEF/#IFNDEF/#ELSE/#ELIF/#ENDIF + DEFINE macro substitution
rows.notes: Resolved before parse; :-qualified temp identifiers (name:tmp, X:tmp= overwrite) supported.
rows.feature_zh: SVRF/Calibre 前置處理器——#DEFINE/#IFDEF/#IFNDEF/#ELSE/#ELIF/#ENDIF 以及 DEFINE 巨集替換
rows.notes_zh: 於解析前先展開；支援以冒號限定的暫存識別字（name:tmp、X:tmp= 覆寫）。

rows.feature: Scale/perf: --threads rule-check parallelism + topological derivation-phase (operation-level) parallelism + spatial tiling of the space/separation/width/notch/enclosure family + Route-B tiling of giant derivation ops + parallel prewarm-merge
rows.commercial: Calibre nmDRC hyperscale multi-CPU / hierarchical scaling
rows.notes: Tiled (TiledKind, DerivTileClass) + threaded; flat+tiled, not yet true cell-hierarchical (see #7).
rows.feature_zh: 規模/效能：--threads 規則檢查平行化 + 拓樸式推導階段（運算層級）平行化 + 對 space/separation/width/notch/enclosure 家族的空間分塊（tiling）+ 針對超大推導運算的 Route-B 分塊 + 平行預熱合併（prewarm-merge）
rows.notes_zh: 已分塊（TiledKind、DerivTileClass）且多執行緒；為攤平＋分塊，尚非真正的 cell 階層式（見 #7）。

rows.feature: Honest-SKIP doctrine (never false-PASS): ANTENNA charge-ratio → dedicated checker; edge-typed-without-polygon; unextracted net layers; unmodeled derivations → explicit SKIP w/ reason
rows.commercial: Calibre emits explicit per-rule status (no silent pass)
rows.notes: §4.05 no-cheat: a rewrite that turns SKIP→PASS is a silicon-DOA hazard; frozen report format VERDICT name op l1/l2 cmp value -> count.
rows.feature_zh: 誠實 SKIP 準則（絕不假 PASS）：ANTENNA 電荷比 → 專用檢查器；有邊型別但無多邊形者；未萃取的 net 層；未建模的推導 → 明確 SKIP 並附原因
rows.notes_zh: §4.05 不作弊：把 SKIP 改寫成 PASS 是會導致晶片一到手即失效（silicon-DOA）的隱患；報告格式凍結為 VERDICT name op l1/l2 cmp value -> count。

rows.feature: Observability: SVRFDRC_DEBUG unmodeled-chain dump, SVRFDRC_DUMP_GDS derived region/edge-layer dump, SVRFDRC_VIOBBOX/VIOPAIR violation-bbox + edge-pair dump
rows.notes: File-based dump (SEE a derived intermediate, no oracle) — not yet an interactive DB/GUI (see #9).
rows.feature_zh: 可觀測性：SVRFDRC_DEBUG 傾印未建模鏈、SVRFDRC_DUMP_GDS 傾印推導出的 region/edge 層、SVRFDRC_VIOBBOX/VIOPAIR 傾印違規 bbox 與 edge-pair
rows.notes_zh: 以檔案形式傾印（可檢視推導出的中介結果，非 oracle）——尚非互動式資料庫/GUI（見 #9）。

rows.feature: Opt-in cell-aware FEOL exemption for isolated foundry cells
rows.notes: Narrows corner-drop / region handling to ABUT-qualified rules (§4.05 keeps genuine diagonal shorts).
rows.feature_zh: 可選擇啟用的 cell 感知 FEOL 豁免，適用於孤立的 foundry cell
rows.notes_zh: 將 corner-drop / region 處理收斂到符合 ABUT 條件的規則（§4.05 仍保留真正的對角短路）。

rows.feature: True hierarchical DRC (cell-level dedup on DeepShapeStore hierarchy) instead of flatten+tile
rows.notes: Big speed/mem win on full-chip; run checks once per unique cell + propagate. Current tiling is a flat-scale workaround.
rows.feature_zh: 真正的階層式 DRC（在 DeepShapeStore 階層上做 cell 層級去重），取代攤平＋分塊
rows.notes_zh: 在全晶片上有很大的速度/記憶體收益；每個唯一 cell 只檢查一次再傳播。目前的分塊只是攤平式擴充的權宜作法。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] hier-DRC — perf-only, no crisp geometric gate.

rows.feature: Equation-based DRC (eqDRC) — property-based numeric operators / conditional-measurement rules
rows.notes: Whole class of modern foundry rules currently falls to unmodeled→SKIP. Add a small expression evaluator over per-shape/per-net measured properties.
rows.feature_zh: 方程式導向 DRC（eqDRC）——以屬性為基礎的數值運算子 / 條件式量測規則
rows.notes_zh: 現代 foundry 有一整類規則目前都落入未建模→SKIP。需在每個 shape/每個 net 的量測屬性上加一個小型運算式求值器。

rows.feature: Interactive result database (RVE-style .db + cross-probe / error-rings)
rows.notes: Emit a KLayout-loadable marker DB (.lyrdb) from svrfdrc so violations cross-probe in the GUI. Builds on #5's geometry dump.
rows.feature_zh: 互動式結果資料庫（RVE 風格的 .db + 交叉探查 / error-ring）
rows.notes_zh: 由 svrfdrc 輸出 KLayout 可載入的標記資料庫（.lyrdb），讓違規可在 GUI 中交叉探查。建立在 #5 的幾何傾印之上。

rows.feature: Automated waiver management — pre-approved geometric/topological waivers removed from the report, traceable, multi-user-safe
rows.notes: Waiver polygons/rule-ids → subtract matched violations, keep an audit trail. Pure algorithm; high workflow value.
rows.feature_zh: 自動化 waiver 管理——預先核准的幾何/拓樸 waiver 會從報告中移除，可追溯、多人使用安全
rows.notes_zh: 以 waiver 多邊形/rule-id → 扣除相符的違規，並保留稽核軌跡。純演算法；工作流程價值高。

rows.feature: Incremental / in-design DRC (re-check only the changed region)
rows.notes: Bounding-box-scoped re-run; the "signoff-engine-in-the-editor" loop OSS lacks. Pairs with #29.
rows.feature_zh: 增量式 / 設計中 DRC（只重新檢查變更過的區域）
rows.notes_zh: 以 bounding-box 為範圍重跑；這是 OSS 缺少的「編輯器內簽核引擎」迴圈。與 #29 搭配。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] incremental DRC — perf-only.

rows.feature: Voltage-aware / net-voltage-dependent spacing (VDD-dependent rules)
rows.notes: Needs per-net voltage annotation propagated via LayoutToNetlist; then metric select by net-pair voltage.
rows.feature_zh: 電壓感知 / net 電壓相依的間距（VDD 相依規則）
rows.notes_zh: 需要透過 LayoutToNetlist 傳播每個 net 的電壓註記；再依 net-pair 電壓選擇量測值。

rows.feature: ERC as a native op — floating-gate / missing-tie / unconnected-input electrical checks
rows.notes: Reuse the LayoutToNetlist connectivity already built for CONNECT/net-ratio.
rows.feature_zh: 將 ERC 作為原生運算子——floating-gate / 缺少 tie / 未連接輸入等電氣檢查
rows.notes_zh: 重用已為 CONNECT/net-ratio 建立的 LayoutToNetlist 連通性。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: Spacing/width family: EXTERNAL(space/separation), INTERNAL/WIDTH, NOTCH, ENCLOSURE, AREA, PERIMETER + metric modifiers ABUT/PROJECTING/PARALLEL/SQUARE/OPPOSITE/WHOLE/SHIELDED/TRANSPARENT/REGION
rows.notes: 1:1 onto db::Region::{space,separation,width,notch,enclosing,overlap}_check + RegionCheckOptions. Incl. REGION corner-drop (ABUT-scoped, §4.05 no-mask).
rows.feature_zh: 間距/寬度家族：EXTERNAL(space/separation)、INTERNAL/WIDTH、NOTCH、ENCLOSURE、AREA、PERIMETER，加上量測修飾詞 ABUT/PROJECTING/PARALLEL/SQUARE/OPPOSITE/WHOLE/SHIELDED/TRANSPARENT/REGION
rows.notes_zh: 一對一對應到 db::Region::{space,separation,width,notch,enclosing,overlap}_check + RegionCheckOptions。含 REGION corner-drop（限定 ABUT 範圍，§4.05 不遮罩）。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: Boolean + sizing derivations: AND/OR/NOT/XOR; SIZE/GROW/SHRINK incl. OVERUNDER/UNDEROVER/STEP morphology + one-sided RIGHT/LEFT/TOP/BOTTOM
rows.notes: Morphological close/open (sized composed); one-sided = half-size + pinning translation.
rows.feature_zh: 布林 + 尺寸調整推導：AND/OR/NOT/XOR；SIZE/GROW/SHRINK，含 OVERUNDER/UNDEROVER/STEP 形態學運算 + 單邊 RIGHT/LEFT/TOP/BOTTOM
rows.notes_zh: 形態學閉/開運算（以尺寸調整組合而成）；單邊 = 半尺寸 + 釘位平移。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: Select/topology derivations: INTERACT (==N/>N/<N counts), INSIDE/OUTSIDE, CUT (straddle semantics), TOUCH, ENCLOSE, HOLES, RECTANGLE(S), VERTEX, EXTENT(S), COINCIDENT, MERGE
rows.notes: Count-aware selected_interacting; CUT = straddles-boundary (not merely interacts); nullary EXTENT = layout extent.
rows.feature_zh: 選取/拓樸推導：INTERACT（==N/>N/<N 計數）、INSIDE/OUTSIDE、CUT（跨越語意）、TOUCH、ENCLOSE、HOLES、RECTANGLE(S)、VERTEX、EXTENT(S)、COINCIDENT、MERGE
rows.notes_zh: 計數感知的 selected_interacting；CUT = 跨越邊界（不只是相交）；無引數的 EXTENT = 整個佈局範圍。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: Edge pipeline: EDGE/INNER EDGE/OUTER EDGE, INSIDE EDGE/OUTSIDE EDGE (coincident-exclusion), COINCIDENT EDGE, TOUCH EDGE, LENGTH/ANGLE filters, EXPAND EDGE, edge-layer EXTERNAL/INTERNAL/ENCLOSURE
rows.notes: Result is a db::Edges layer; OUTSIDE EDGE excludes edges coincident with b's boundary (Calibre parity).
rows.feature_zh: Edge 管線：EDGE/INNER EDGE/OUTER EDGE、INSIDE EDGE/OUTSIDE EDGE（排除重合）、COINCIDENT EDGE、TOUCH EDGE、LENGTH/ANGLE 濾除、EXPAND EDGE、edge 層的 EXTERNAL/INTERNAL/ENCLOSURE
rows.notes_zh: 結果為 db::Edges 層；OUTSIDE EDGE 會排除與 b 邊界重合的邊（與 Calibre 對齊）。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: Windowed DENSITY (WINDOW/STEP, own-bbox denominator) + NET AREA RATIO (per-net via LayoutToNetlist)
rows.notes: Sliding-window area/window-area; per-net shapes_of_net().area() ratio (regions held by reference to satisfy DSS layer map).
rows.feature_zh: 視窗式 DENSITY（WINDOW/STEP，以自身 bbox 為分母）+ NET AREA RATIO（透過 LayoutToNetlist 逐 net 計算）
rows.notes_zh: 滑動視窗面積/視窗面積；逐 net 的 shapes_of_net().area() 比值（regions 以參考方式持有以符合 DSS layer map）。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: Connectivity: CONNECT a b BY via + CONNECTED/NOT CONNECTED
rows.notes: LayoutToNetlist + Same/DifferentPropertiesConstraint.
rows.feature_zh: 連通性：CONNECT a b BY via + CONNECTED/NOT CONNECTED
rows.notes_zh: LayoutToNetlist + Same/DifferentPropertiesConstraint。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: Native ANTENNA SVRF op inside the engine (currently routed OUT to the separate GDS-geometry antenna deck / router)
rows.notes: Fold the staged charge-ratio model (row #26) into svrfdrc as a first-class op so one deck run covers antenna too; keep the honest cross-check. DONE (landed vibeic/klayout 3d391a1da): native two-layer 'ANTENNA <metal> <gate>' runs in-engine on db::LayoutToNetlist with staged (as-fabricated) connectivity; gate-less one-layer form still honest-SKIPs. Unfakeable gate run_antenna_engine_test.sh 5/5 (ratio==hand-computed 50.0; staged jumper ignored) + engine_antenna.golden byte-identical.
rows.feature_zh: 引擎內原生的 ANTENNA SVRF 運算子（目前是外送到獨立的 GDS 幾何 antenna deck / router）
rows.notes_zh: 把分階段（staged）的電荷比模型（第 #26 列）收進 svrfdrc 成為一級運算子，讓單次 deck 執行也能涵蓋 antenna；同時保留誠實的交叉檢查。已完成（落地於 vibeic/klayout 3d391a1da）：原生雙層 'ANTENNA <metal> <gate>' 在 db::LayoutToNetlist 上以分階段（as-fabricated）連通性於引擎內執行；無 gate 的單層形式仍誠實 SKIP。不可造假 gate run_antenna_engine_test.sh 5/5（ratio == 手算 50.0；忽略分階段 jumper）＋ engine_antenna.golden byte-identical。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: Pattern Matching — geometric pattern library, match known-bad shapes in the same deck
rows.notes: Compile pattern GDS → edge/shape signature → match on db::Region. Unlocks DFM hotspot rules (shared with #33).
rows.feature_zh: 圖樣比對（Pattern Matching）——幾何圖樣庫，在同一份 deck 中比對已知不良形狀
rows.notes_zh: 將圖樣 GDS 編譯 → edge/shape 特徵簽章 → 在 db::Region 上比對。可解鎖 DFM 熱點規則（與 #33 共用）。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: TVF (Tcl Verification Format) deck ingestion — Tcl-driven rule generation
rows.notes: Optional Tcl front-end that emits SVRF statements into db::SVRFDeck; keeps the C++ engine unchanged.
rows.feature_zh: TVF（Tcl Verification Format）deck 匯入——以 Tcl 驅動的規則產生
rows.notes_zh: 選用的 Tcl 前端，將 SVRF 敘述輸出至 db::SVRFDeck；C++ 引擎維持不變。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] TVF Tcl front-end — format-parity, no gate.

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: DEVICE / LVS-extraction statements in SVRF — same deck drives LVS device recognition
rows.notes: Parse DEVICE + connectivity into LayoutToNetlist device classes; feeds the svrflvs buddy (#24).
rows.feature_zh: SVRF 中的 DEVICE / LVS 萃取敘述——同一份 deck 也驅動 LVS 元件辨識
rows.notes_zh: 將 DEVICE + 連通性解析為 LayoutToNetlist 的元件類別；餵給 svrflvs buddy（#24）。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] SVRF DEVICE — [EXT] device data.

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: Text/label rules: TEXT/LABEL/ATTACH/PORT layer handling + SNAP/DRAWN/PATH ops
rows.notes: Parser already tokenizes SNAP/PATH/DRAWN; wire label attachment to net properties.
rows.feature_zh: 文字/標籤規則：TEXT/LABEL/ATTACH/PORT 層處理 + SNAP/DRAWN/PATH 運算
rows.notes_zh: 解析器已將 SNAP/PATH/DRAWN 斷詞；需把標籤附掛接到 net 屬性。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: Multi-patterning / coloring decomposition ops (MASK, DPT/TPT color, stitch, anchor, pre-color)
rows.commercial: Calibre MP decomposition [ALGO engine / EXT rules]
rows.notes: MASK <layer> SPACING <d> — multi-patterning 2-coloring decomposability. Native db::SVRFEngine op (6f45acff1): builds the same-mask conflict graph (edge where spacing<d, euclidian, exactly-d legal), BFS 2-colours, reports odd-cycle (non-bipartite) components. Gate run_mask_engine_test.sh 6/6 — REAL 2-coloring proof: a triangle (odd) FAILs 3 at exact bboxes, a 4-cycle ring (even, diagonals 0.354>0.30) PASSes; boundary to the DBU (0.30 gap drops the edge->PASS, 0.299->FAIL). Colour ASSIGNMENT is foundry-[EXT]; the decomposability test is pure geometry+graph [ALGO]. (A sibling also shipped a standalone python mp-color tool 310a5afb1 — same id, tool-vs-engine split; counted ONCE here as the native op.)
rows.feature_zh: 多重曝光 / 著色分解運算（MASK、DPT/TPT 著色、stitch、anchor、pre-color）
rows.notes_zh: 圖形 2/3 著色 + 奇環衝突偵測屬於 [ALGO]（可 fork）；而著色規則則屬 foundry-[EXT]。在需要用到多重曝光製程節點的 PDK 進入範圍前先擱置。

rows.area: SVRF-deck-coverage (operators modeled vs a full Calibre deck)
rows.feature: PERC-style topological/electrical rules (device-graph checks, ESD/latch-up guard-ring, P2P resistance)
rows.notes: PERC latch-up: geometry-derivable guard-ring / n-well-to-tap checks. Python tool ef1ec6597 with gate run_perc_latchup_test.sh. Largely composes existing ENCLOSURE+CONNECT ops; the natural gate is topological.
rows.feature_zh: PERC 風格的拓樸/電氣規則（元件圖檢查、ESD/latch-up guard-ring、P2P 電阻）
rows.notes_zh: 在 LayoutToNetlist 上遍歷 net+元件圖屬於 [ALGO]；ESD/latch-up 規則集則屬 foundry-[EXT]。先從 latch-up guard-ring 的存在性/寬度/間距（14 項檢查家族）著手。

rows.feature: KLayout-native LVS via pya::NetlistComparer with bulk-normalize (NMOS.B→VSS / PMOS.B→VDD) + pin-fix + filler-decap drop + W/L tolerance — genuine full MATCH on a commercial PDK where netgen bus-saturates
rows.notes: Plugin wrapper klayout_pdk_lvs.py over stock pya::NetlistComparer; false-clean proven-negative (corrupt→MISMATCH).
rows.feature_zh: 以 pya::NetlistComparer 實作的 KLayout 原生 LVS，搭配 bulk 正規化（NMOS.B→VSS / PMOS.B→VDD）+ pin 修正 + 丟棄 filler-decap + W/L 容差——在 netgen 會 bus 飽和的商用 PDK 上達成真正的完整 MATCH
rows.notes_zh: 外掛包裝 klayout_pdk_lvs.py 建構於原版 pya::NetlistComparer 之上；已用反例證明不會假性乾淨（刻意破壞→MISMATCH）。

rows.feature: Deck-driven native LVS buddy (svrflvs) — mirror svrfdrc, drive NetlistComparer from a foundry SVRF LVS deck (DEVICE statements, #23)
rows.notes: C++ buddy sibling to svrfdrc; deck → device extraction → compare. Makes LVS deck-native, not hand-wired.
rows.feature_zh: 以 deck 驅動的原生 LVS buddy（svrflvs）——比照 svrfdrc，從 foundry SVRF LVS deck（DEVICE 敘述，#23）驅動 NetlistComparer
rows.notes_zh: 與 svrfdrc 同系列的 C++ buddy；deck → 元件萃取 → 比對。讓 LVS 以 deck 為原生來源，而非手工接線。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] LVS buddy — cross-tool.

rows.feature: Connectivity-graph (isomorphism) global correspondence when names differ / portless top
rows.notes: Cross-tool with netgen's same gap; bind a global to a differently-named net when device-terminal fanout is isomorphic.
rows.feature_zh: 當名稱不同 / 頂層無 port 時，以連通性圖（同構）建立 global 對應
rows.notes_zh: 與 netgen 相同缺口的跨工具議題；當元件端點的 fanout 同構時，將 global 綁定到名稱不同的 net。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] format parity.

rows.feature: LVS Recon / short-isolation debug (localize the first short between two nets)
rows.notes: Path-trace on the extracted graph; emit the shorting geometry as an RVE marker (reuses #9).
rows.feature_zh: LVS Recon / 短路隔離除錯（定位兩個 net 之間的第一個短路）
rows.notes_zh: 在萃取出的圖上做路徑追蹤；將造成短路的幾何以 RVE 標記輸出（重用 #9）。

rows.area: GDS-streamout (fork src patch: LEF/DEF importer + GDS writer)
rows.feature: Merge-abutting streamout — union same-layer polygons touching across instance boundaries at write time
rows.notes: Eliminates ~26% boundary false min-spacing/width DRC (Ibex m1.2 11,470). Deferred to finish() to avoid dangling macro/via db::Cell* SIGSEGV. Opt-in KLAYOUT_LEFDEF_MERGE_ABUTTING=1.
rows.feature_zh: 合併相鄰 streamout——寫出時將跨 instance 邊界相接的同層多邊形聯集起來
rows.notes_zh: 可消除約 26% 邊界處的假性 min-spacing/width DRC（Ibex m1.2 11,470 筆）。延到 finish() 執行以避免懸空的 macro/via db::Cell* 造成 SIGSEGV。以 KLAYOUT_LEFDEF_MERGE_ABUTTING=1 選擇啟用。

rows.area: GDS-streamout (fork src patch: LEF/DEF importer + GDS writer)
rows.feature: Hierarchical merge-abutting — merge only at instance boundaries, avoid full-die flatten cost
rows.notes: Current impl flattens top then unions per layer; make it cell-boundary-scoped so full-chip is tractable. Then make default-ON (drop the env gate).
rows.feature_zh: 階層式合併相鄰——只在 instance 邊界合併，避免整顆 die 攤平的成本
rows.notes_zh: 目前實作會先攤平頂層再逐層聯集；改為以 cell 邊界為範圍，讓全晶片可行。之後改為預設開啟（拿掉環境變數開關）。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] hier merge-abut streamout — perf-only.

rows.area: GDS-streamout (fork src patch: LEF/DEF importer + GDS writer)
rows.feature: OASIS streamout strict-mode parity
rows.notes: KLayout upstream already writes OASIS; no fork gap unless a strict-mode divergence is measured.
rows.feature_zh: OASIS streamout strict-mode 對齊
rows.notes_zh: KLayout 上游已能寫出 OASIS；除非量測到 strict-mode 有分歧，否則無 fork 缺口。

rows.feature: Foundry layer-map instead of compact 1..N fallback — auto-apply the PDK LEF/DEF GDS layer/datatype map so the streamed GDS is Magic/LVS-readable
rows.notes: Gatekeeper-reverified: stock met1.PIN=1/2 (Magic-unreadable, breaks LVS) → real met1.PIN=68/16, via1=67/44, met1.NET=68/20.
rows.feature_zh: 使用 foundry layer-map 取代精簡的 1..N 退回機制——自動套用 PDK 的 LEF/DEF GDS layer/datatype 對應，讓輸出的 GDS 可被 Magic/LVS 讀取
rows.notes_zh: 經 gatekeeper 重新驗證：原版 met1.PIN=1/2（Magic 無法讀取、破壞 LVS）→ 正確的 met1.PIN=68/16、via1=67/44、met1.NET=68/20。

rows.feature: MANUFACTURINGGRID snap — parse tech-LEF MANUFACTURINGGRID, snap DEF component-placement displacement + rule-based via enclosure/cut geometry
rows.commercial: Calibre / ICC2 / Innovus MFG-grid snap on output
rows.notes: Kills ~76% OFFGRID false-DRC (Ibex/sha256). Default-ON (no-op on grid-legal geometry); KLAYOUT_LEFDEF_MFG_GRID_SNAP=0 / KLAYOUT_LEFDEF_MFG_GRID=<µm> overrides. OFFGRID_VERTICES 8→0.
rows.feature_zh: MANUFACTURINGGRID 對齊——解析 tech-LEF 的 MANUFACTURINGGRID，將 DEF 元件擺放位移 + 規則導向的 via enclosure/cut 幾何對齊到網格
rows.notes_zh: 可消除約 76% 的 OFFGRID 假性 DRC（Ibex/sha256）。預設開啟（對已在網格上的幾何為無操作）；可用 KLAYOUT_LEFDEF_MFG_GRID_SNAP=0 / KLAYOUT_LEFDEF_MFG_GRID=<µm> 覆寫。OFFGRID_VERTICES 8→0。

rows.feature: Auto-derive GDS layer/datatype from tech-LEF layer names when no explicit map is shipped
rows.notes: Fallback below #34: when no .map, derive canonical GDS numbers from LEF LAYER names + PDK convention instead of compact numbering.
rows.feature_zh: 當未附帶明確對應表時，從 tech-LEF 的 layer 名稱自動推導 GDS layer/datatype
rows.notes_zh: 作為 #34 之下的退回機制：當沒有 .map 時，從 LEF 的 LAYER 名稱 + PDK 慣例推導出正規的 GDS 編號，而非精簡編號。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] [EXT].

rows.area: fill (additive Python tool on KLayout Region#fill)
rows.feature: Per-layer density metal-fill on KLayout's native fill engine (tile → per-window density → insert dummy fill), DRC-safe by construction (keep-out + fill_margin + pitch ≥ width+space), iterative-densify to guarantee worst-window ≥ target, honest reached=false + achieved density when infeasible
rows.notes: metal-fill/metal_fill.py; real sky130 spm: met1 0.158→0.415 / met2 0.052→0.406 / met3 0.052→0.435, all reach target, 0 new DRC (svrfdrc before==after==0). Unfakeable gate 3/3.
rows.feature_zh: 在 KLayout 原生 fill 引擎上做逐層密度金屬填充（分塊 → 逐視窗密度 → 插入 dummy fill），設計上即 DRC-safe（keep-out + fill_margin + pitch ≥ width+space），以迭代加密確保最差視窗 ≥ 目標值，不可行時誠實回報 reached=false 與實際達成密度
rows.notes_zh: metal-fill/metal_fill.py；真實 sky130 spm：met1 0.158→0.415 / met2 0.052→0.406 / met3 0.052→0.435，全部達標，零新增 DRC（svrfdrc 前==後==0）。不可造假 gate 3/3。

rows.area: fill (additive Python tool on KLayout Region#fill)
rows.feature: Model-based / SmartFill — litho-aware, floating-vs-grounded, staggered/iso-dense-aware fill (beyond pure density)
rows.notes: Density part is [ALGO] (writable); litho-uniformity model is partly [EXT]. Ship the grounded/floating + stagger geometry first.
rows.feature_zh: 模型導向 / SmartFill——litho 感知、floating 對 grounded、錯位/疏密感知的填充（超越純密度）
rows.notes_zh: 密度部分屬 [ALGO]（可自行實作）；litho 均勻度模型部分屬 [EXT]。先交付 grounded/floating + 錯位幾何。
rows.reclass_note: [EXT-CEILING] Headline of #38 is 'Model-based / SmartFill — litho-aware' (Calibre YieldEnhancer SmartFill, [HYB]). The defining half — fill PLACEMENT driven by a foundry-calibrated CMP dishing/erosion model + litho hotspot/OPC model to decide WHERE fill improves planarity/litho uniformity (iso-vs-dense-adaptive) — has NO OSS data source: sky130/gf180mcu ship no CMP dishin

rows.area: fill (additive Python tool on KLayout Region#fill)
rows.feature: Cheesing / slotting of wide metal (stress + CMP relief, min-density-on-wide-shape)
rows.notes: Cut holes into wide shapes to satisfy max-density / slotting rules; DRC-safe on the same svrfdrc deck.
rows.feature_zh: 寬金屬的挖孔（cheesing）/ 開槽（slotting）（紓解應力 + CMP，寬形狀上的最小密度）
rows.notes_zh: 在寬形狀上挖孔以滿足最大密度 / slotting 規則；在同一份 svrfdrc deck 上維持 DRC-safe。

rows.area: fill (additive Python tool on KLayout Region#fill)
rows.feature: Timing/coupling-aware fill — grounded fill for shielding, keep-away from critical nets, RC-impact-bounded
rows.notes: Needs critical-net list + an RC-delta proxy; grounded-fill keep-away is the [ALGO] core.
rows.feature_zh: 時序/耦合感知的填充——以 grounded fill 做屏蔽、對關鍵 net 保持距離、限制 RC 影響
rows.notes_zh: 需要關鍵 net 清單 + 一個 RC-delta 代理指標；grounded-fill 的保持距離是 [ALGO] 核心。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] timing-aware fill — needs RC proxy/field solver.

rows.area: fill (additive Python tool on KLayout Region#fill)
rows.feature: Hierarchical fill (cell-based fill reuse, not flat)
rows.notes: Fill a template cell once and array it; full-chip scale.
rows.feature_zh: 階層式填充（以 cell 為基礎重用填充，而非攤平）
rows.notes_zh: 只填充一個樣板 cell 再陣列化；達到全晶片規模。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] [EXT].

rows.area: fill (additive Python tool on KLayout Region#fill)
rows.feature: Multi-format back-annotate — write fill to LEF/DEF/OASIS/OA, not only GDS
rows.notes: Currently GDS-only; add DEF SPECIALNET / OASIS emit.
rows.feature_zh: 多格式回註（back-annotate）——將填充寫入 LEF/DEF/OASIS/OA，而不只是 GDS
rows.notes_zh: 目前僅支援 GDS；需新增 DEF SPECIALNET / OASIS 輸出。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] [EXT] data.

rows.area: antenna (additive Python tool on KLayout LayoutToNetlist)
rows.feature: Independent GDS-geometry process-antenna DRC on the STREAMED GDS — staged (as-fabricated) per-metal-layer connectivity so an upper jumper cannot relieve a lower-stage antenna; per-net ratio = connected-metal-area / connected-gate-area vs a per-layer limit; router cross-check (xcheck_router.py)
rows.notes: gds-antenna/antenna_check.py on LayoutToNetlist. Closes the gap where only a router-report consumer existed. Unfakeable gate 4/4; real spm worst li1 31.5 / met1 26.0 / met2 14.7, cross-check AGREEs.
rows.feature_zh: 在輸出的 GDS 上做獨立的 GDS 幾何製程 antenna DRC——採分階段（as-fabricated）逐金屬層連通性，使上層 jumper 無法紓解下階段的 antenna；每 net 比值 = 連通金屬面積 / 連通 gate 面積，對照逐層上限；並與 router 交叉檢查（xcheck_router.py）
rows.notes_zh: gds-antenna/antenna_check.py 建構於 LayoutToNetlist。補上過去只有 router 報告消費端的缺口。不可造假 gate 4/4；真實 spm 最差 li1 31.5 / met1 26.0 / met2 14.7，交叉檢查一致。

rows.area: antenna (additive Python tool on KLayout LayoutToNetlist)
rows.feature: Cumulative antenna area (CAA) across via layers + charge-sharing model
rows.notes: Natural extension of the DONE staged/per-layer model: accumulate metal+via area up each stage; the highest-value forkable antenna gap. DONE (landed vibeic/klayout 43908ef37): CAA accumulates metal+via+contact area up each stage vs a separate cumulative_ratio bound, alongside the per-layer ratio. Unfakeable gate run_antenna_tests.sh 5a/5b: a design passing every per-layer metal ratio (30<40) FAILs cumulative (60.18>50) — proves CAA != per-layer.
rows.feature_zh: 跨 via 層的累積式 antenna 面積（CAA）+ 電荷共享模型
rows.notes_zh: 已完成的分階段/逐層模型的自然延伸：沿每個階段累加 metal+via 面積；是最有價值、可 fork 的 antenna 缺口。已完成（落地於 vibeic/klayout 43908ef37）：CAA 沿每個階段累加 metal+via+contact 面積，對照獨立的 cumulative_ratio 上限，與逐層比值並行。不可造假 gate run_antenna_tests.sh 5a/5b：一個通過所有逐層金屬比值（30<40）的設計，在累積比值上 FAIL（60.18>50）——證明 CAA 不等於逐層。

rows.area: antenna (additive Python tool on KLayout LayoutToNetlist)
rows.feature: Diode-aware relief + fix suggestion — recognize protection diodes, suggest insertion points
rows.notes: Detect diode devices via LayoutToNetlist, mark nets already protected, emit candidate insertion sites.
rows.feature_zh: diode 感知的紓解 + 修復建議——辨識保護二極體、建議插入點
rows.notes_zh: 透過 LayoutToNetlist 偵測二極體元件，標記已受保護的 net，並輸出候選插入位置。

rows.feature: Critical Area Analysis (CAA) / random-particle-defect yield model
rows.commercial: Calibre YieldAnalyzer CAA [ALGO engine / EXT defect-density]
rows.notes: CRITAREA <layer> RADIUS <rho> <cmp> <val> — shorts critical area = union of (P_i+rho)INTERSECT(P_j+rho). Native engine op (6f45acff1). Gate 7/7: base CA=13.000000 to the DBU (marker [2.5,0.5,3.5,13.5]); s-1DBU->13.013 FAIL; s=4->CA=0 (defect can't bridge). Defect density stays an [EXT] caller multiplier. (Sibling python caa tool 4c3c03019 — same id; counted ONCE as the native op.)
rows.feature_zh: 關鍵面積分析（CAA）/ 隨機微粒缺陷良率模型
rows.notes_zh: 關鍵面積的幾何積分屬 [ALGO]；缺陷密度分布屬 [EXT]。交付幾何引擎，將缺陷密度（DD）作為參數輸入。

rows.feature: DFM scoring / recommended-rule (soft-rule) checks with weighted score
rows.commercial: Calibre DFM recommended rules [ALGO / EXT weights]
rows.notes: Run soft-rule spacings on the svrfdrc engine, aggregate a weighted score instead of pass/fail.
rows.feature_zh: DFM 評分 / 建議規則（soft-rule）檢查，並給出加權分數
rows.notes_zh: 在 svrfdrc 引擎上執行 soft-rule 間距檢查，彙整成加權分數而非單純 pass/fail。

rows.feature: Litho-friendly-design (LFD) hotspot / litho simulation
rows.notes: Needs the foundry optical/resist model — real [EXT] ceiling. A geometric pattern-match proxy (#21) is the forkable stand-in.
rows.feature_zh: 微影友善設計（LFD）熱點 / litho 模擬
rows.notes_zh: 需要 foundry 的光學/光阻模型——屬真正的 [EXT] 天花板。以幾何圖樣比對代理（#21）作為可 fork 的替代方案。

rows.feature: CMP / planarity simulation (density-gradient dishing/erosion)
rows.notes: DENSITY … WINDOW … STEP … GRADIENT — |density_i-density_j| between edge-adjacent tiles (CMP planarity proxy). Native engine op (6f45acff1). Gate 6/6: step 0.60 FAILs; boundary 0.500 PASS / 0.5001 FAIL; a UNIFORM 0.60 fill PASSes GRADIENT while plain DENSITY>0.50 FAILs on identical geometry — proves it is a genuinely different check, not an echo. (Sibling python cmp-gradient tool — same id; counted ONCE.)
rows.feature_zh: CMP / 平坦度模擬（密度梯度造成的 dishing/erosion）
rows.notes_zh: 經 foundry 校準的 CMP 模型 = [EXT]。密度梯度檢查器（視窗對視窗的 Δ）是可 fork 的代理——可作為低成本 TODO 加入。

rows.feature: Full interactive layout editor (GUI, scripting, DRC-driven edit)
rows.notes: Upstream KLayout strength — not a fork gap.
rows.feature_zh: 完整的互動式佈局編輯器（GUI、腳本、DRC 驅動編輯）
rows.notes_zh: KLayout 上游的強項——非 fork 缺口。

rows.feature: Signoff-engine-in-the-editor — run svrfdrc incrementally inside the KLayout editor with live markers
rows.commercial: Calibre RealTime in-design DRC [ALGO interface / EXT deck]
rows.notes: GSI-expose db::SVRFEngine (already reusable classes) + wire the incremental scope (#11) + RVE markers (#9). The "signoff-engine-in-the-loop" OSS lacks.
rows.feature_zh: 編輯器內簽核引擎——在 KLayout 編輯器內以增量方式執行 svrfdrc 並即時顯示標記
rows.notes_zh: 透過 GSI 對外暴露 db::SVRFEngine（已是可重用的類別）+ 接上增量範圍（#11）+ RVE 標記（#9）。這是 OSS 缺少的「迴圈中的簽核引擎」。
rows.reclass_note: [DEFERRED/EXCLUDED — gate-honesty] signoff-in-editor — GUI GSI.

rows.feature: Native device/netlist extraction (db::LayoutToNetlist) — already driving LVS (#27), antenna (#43), and NET AREA RATIO (#18)
rows.notes: Upstream capability, wired into three fork features; no source patch needed.
rows.feature_zh: 原生元件/netlist 萃取（db::LayoutToNetlist）——已驅動 LVS（#27）、antenna（#43）與 NET AREA RATIO（#18）
rows.notes_zh: 上游既有能力，已接進三項 fork 功能；無須原始碼修補。

rows.feature: Signoff-grade RC/coupling PEX (field solver + foundry techfile)
rows.commercial: Calibre xACT/xRC, StarRC, Quantus [ALGO engine / EXT techfile]
rows.notes: Field-solver engine is [ALGO] but signoff accuracy is techfile-[EXT] → OSS ceiling. Cross-tool to OpenRCX (OpenROAD fork) rather than KLayout.
rows.feature_zh: 簽核級 RC/耦合 PEX（field solver + foundry techfile）
rows.notes_zh: field-solver 引擎屬 [ALGO]，但簽核精度取決於 techfile，屬 [EXT] → OSS 天花板。跨工具交由 OpenRCX（OpenROAD fork）處理，而非 KLayout。

rows.feature: Multi-threaded SVRF DRC engine + tiled geometry (DONE in fork)
rows.notes: KLayout DRC/geometry is ALREADY multi-threaded in our fork: the SVRF DRC engine (dbSVRFEngine.cc) runs a tl::Thread worker pool gated by m_threads with per-level barriers and a serial pass-1 for derivations, and dbTilingProcessor + tlThreadedWorkers provide tiled parallel booleans/streamout. This is our production signoff-DRC path. Reference only — no new fork work.
rows.feature_zh: 多執行緒 SVRF DRC 引擎＋分塊幾何（fork 已完成）
rows.notes_zh: KLayout DRC/幾何在我們的 fork 已多執行緒化：SVRF DRC 引擎（dbSVRFEngine.cc）以 m_threads 控管 tl::Thread worker pool、含 per-level barrier 與 derivations 的序列 pass-1；dbTilingProcessor + tlThreadedWorkers 提供分塊平行 boolean/streamout。這是我們的簽核 DRC 路徑。列為參考，不做新 fork 工作。

rows.feature: Parallel NetlistComparer (KLayout LVS) matching
rows.notes: KLayout's NetlistComparer — our proven full-LVS MATCH path (pya.NetlistComparer) — is a serial graph compare with the same inherently-sequential floor as netgen's matcher. Same reasoning applies: the kernel is a dependency-chained fixpoint, not thread-friendly. Defer.
rows.feature_zh: 平行化 NetlistComparer（KLayout LVS）比對
rows.notes_zh: KLayout 的 NetlistComparer——我們已驗證的 full-LVS MATCH 路徑（pya.NetlistComparer）——是序列圖比對，與 netgen 比對器有相同的本質序列地板：核心是相依鏈定點、不利多執行緒。Defer。

klayout.summary_zh: 簽核級幾何引擎：原生 C++ SVRF/Calibre DRC 引擎、KLayout 原生 LVS、強化過的 LEF/DEF streamout，外加附加式 antenna-DRC 與密度導向金屬填充。SVRF 運算子涵蓋面廣；最值得 fork 補齊的缺口為 eqDRC、圖樣比對（pattern-matching）、waiver 管理、RVE 結果資料庫，以及累積式 antenna（CAA）。

ngspice.summary: Analog / mixed-signal SPICE (+ xschem schematic capture). Native Monte-Carlo / LHS, batch-honesty markers, homotopy and OSDI device models done; top open items are a JSON --measure sidecar and a native corner-sweep card, then correlated process+mismatch MC, fast-SPICE and an RF steady-state suite (PSS/HB/Pnoise).

rows.feature: Fast-SPICE partitioning + event-driven / latency exploitation (large mixed-signal, SRAM, post-layout)
rows.commercial: Spectre X/FX, PrimeSim XA, Siemens AFS/ADiT
rows.notes: THE marquee fast-SPICE lever: hierarchical/isomorphic partitioning + multi-rate integration + activity-driven latency (skip quiescent partitions). 5–100× throughput on big netlists. Very high effort; published techniques exist.
rows.feature_zh: Fast-SPICE 分割 + 事件驅動 / latency 利用（大型混合訊號、SRAM、佈局後）
rows.notes_zh: 最指標性的 fast-SPICE 槓桿：階層式/同構分割 + 多速率積分 + 活動驅動 latency（跳過靜止的分割區）。在大型 netlist 上可達 5–100× 吞吐量。工作量極高；已有公開發表的技術。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] fast-SPICE partitioning = a core-solver rewrite.

rows.feature: Multithreaded / GPU transient (device-eval + matrix-solve scaling)
rows.notes: KLU + partial OpenMP (.option numthreads, BSIM) already ship; broaden thread scaling as feature-add later, GPU offload deferred.
rows.feature_zh: 多執行緒 / GPU 暫態（元件評估 + 矩陣求解擴展）
rows.notes_zh: KLU + 部分 OpenMP（.option numthreads、BSIM）已隨附出貨；擴大執行緒擴展性列為後續功能新增，GPU 卸載 (offload) 則延後。

rows.feature: Transient checkpoint / save-restore (snapshot & resume long runs)
rows.notes: Transient checkpoint (snsave/snload/resume) is ALREADY upstream and bit-identical on CKTstates-only devices (RC resumed vs closed-form 1-exp(-t/tau): 1.1e-8, endpoint bit-match to 0.0). The FORK VALUE landed here is a SOUNDNESS GUARD: LTRA/Tranline/CplLines/TransLine keep delay/convolution history in malloc'd buffers OUTSIDE CKTstates, so unpatched snsave writes a snapshot that resumes WRONG (LTRA snload aborts 'size for CKTstates[i] is 0'; Tranline silently diverges 0.1667 V on a 0..1 V signal). com_snsave now REFUSES those circuits with an actionable message (URC excluded — it expands to an R/C ladder and resumes fine). Gate 12/0 incl PROVEN-NEGATIVE (unpatched w4 binary writes the bad TL snapshot -> guard half FAILS). Same false-success species the campaign hunted: a checkpoint that silently resumes wrong. commit 376acec branch vibeic/batch-honesty-w5.
rows.feature_zh: 暫態 checkpoint / 存檔-還原（快照並續跑長時間模擬）
rows.notes_zh: 序列化求解器 + 元件狀態，讓長達數日的 mission-profile 模擬可續跑；同時支援 corner/MC 的暖啟動 (warm-start)。

rows.notes_zh: 輸出貢獻度排名表 + 頻帶積分總雜訊（機器可讀），而不只是逐頻率頻譜。

rows.feature: Native .mc card / mc command — single-invocation N-run stat (mean/σ/min/max/yield)
rows.notes: Fork cdb4fae: inpcom rewrites deck-body .mc N … → .control/mc/.endc; resamples agauss/gauss/aunif per run, aggregates .measure, emits ;;MC … YIELD=. Removes the external N-times deck-rewrapping.
rows.feature_zh: 原生 .mc 卡 / mc 指令——單次呼叫執行 N 回合統計（mean/σ/min/max/yield）
rows.notes_zh: Fork cdb4fae：inpcom 將 deck 主體的 .mc N … 改寫為 .control/mc/.endc；每回合重新抽樣 agauss/gauss/aunif、彙總 .measure，並輸出 ;;MC … YIELD=。免除外部把 deck 重新包裝 N 次。

rows.feature: Latin-Hypercube sampling (one-per-bin)
rows.notes: Fork 0b63933: mc N lhs → sampler=lhs ONEPERBIN=1.
rows.feature_zh: 拉丁超立方抽樣 (Latin-Hypercube sampling)（one-per-bin）
rows.notes_zh: Fork 0b63933：mc N lhs → sampler=lhs ONEPERBIN=1。

rows.feature: Correlated process + local-mismatch sampling in one run (PDK statistical blocks)
rows.notes: Today mc resamples independent agauss/gauss only. Add process-vs-mismatch grouping, a shared per-run process draw + per-instance mismatch draw, and a correlation matrix reader — the single highest-value statistical gap for analog yield.
rows.feature_zh: 單一回合內同時抽樣相關性製程 + 局部失配 (local-mismatch)（PDK 統計區塊）
rows.notes_zh: 目前 mc 僅重新抽樣獨立的 agauss/gauss。需加入製程 vs 失配分組、每回合共享一次製程抽樣 + 每個 instance 各自的失配抽樣，以及相關矩陣讀取器——這是類比良率上單一價值最高的統計缺口。

rows.feature: Sobol / low-discrepancy (QMC) sampling
rows.notes: Add a sampler=sobol alongside the existing uniform/lhs; low effort atop the current mc_source resampler, meaningfully faster yield convergence.

rows.notes_zh: 在既有的 uniform/lhs 之外新增 sampler=sobol；架構於目前的 mc_source 重抽樣器之上，工作量低，可明顯加快良率收斂。

rows.feature: High-sigma / 4–7σ verification (importance sampling, worst-case distance)
rows.notes: Rare-event estimators (scaled-sigma / worst-case-distance) — large lever for SRAM/bitcell, but heavy; brute-force .mc covers ≤3σ now.

rows.notes_zh: 稀有事件估計器（scaled-sigma / worst-case-distance）——對 SRAM/bitcell 是大槓桿，但份量重；目前暴力 .mc 僅涵蓋 ≤3σ。

rows.feature: --json-measure: structured per-.measure machine-readable output

rows.feature: Damped/limited-Newton + adaptive gmin schedule tuning
rows.notes: Better step-limiting + adaptive schedule to cut iteration counts on stiff analog.
rows.feature_zh: 阻尼式/受限牛頓法 (damped/limited-Newton) + 自適應 gmin 排程調校
rows.notes_zh: 更佳的步長限制 + 自適應排程，降低剛性 (stiff) 類比電路的迭代次數。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] The named mechanisms are largely ALREADY present, so a new provable win is not achievable in-session. Stock dynamic_gmin (src/spicelib/analysis/cktop.c:299-412) is ALREADY an adaptive gmin schedule: it grows the step factor when a gmin step converges in <= maxiter/4 iterations, shrinks it when a step takes > 3*maxiter/4, and backtracks-and-restores state on
