rows.feature: ngspice ↔ external digital simulator (iverilog / Verilator / cocotb) co-sim bridge
rows.notes: The largest AMS lever per §2.6: use the existing libngspice shared-lib callback API + a time-sync scheduler to couple the analog kernel to a separate digital-event kernel (DPI/socket). Enables true SoC-scale AMS beyond XSPICE primitives.
rows.feature_zh: ngspice ↔ 外部數位模擬器（iverilog / Verilator / cocotb）協同模擬橋
rows.notes_zh: 依 §2.6 為最大的 AMS 槓桿：利用既有的 libngspice 共享函式庫 callback API + 一個時間同步排程器，將類比核心耦合到獨立的數位事件核心（DPI/socket）。可實現超越 XSPICE 原語的真正 SoC 規模 AMS。
rows.reclass_note: [BLOCKED-ON-PRIMITIVE] ngspice<->external digital co-sim: FOOTHOLD exists (sharedspice.h dctran time-sync delta callback); missing = an external digital-kernel scheduler.

rows.feature: S-parameter (SP) analysis + Touchstone I/O + de-embed + mixed-mode

rows.feature: Harmonic Balance (frequency-domain nonlinear multi-tone)
rows.notes: The biggest RF gap — ngspice has no HB engine. Frequency-domain Newton solver for driven nonlinear/RF (PA, mixer). Published methods; large effort.

rows.notes_zh: 最大的 RF 缺口——ngspice 沒有 HB 引擎。用於受驅動非線性/RF（PA、mixer）的頻域牛頓求解器。已有公開方法；工作量大。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] Harmonic Balance — greenfield frequency-domain nonlinear solver.

rows.feature: PAC / PXF / PSP periodic small-signal on PSS/HB

rows.notes_zh: 架構於（已強化的）PSS/HB 基礎之上的週期性小訊號——轉換增益、鏡像/邊帶轉移。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] PAC/PXF/PSP: PSS base EXISTS (dcpss.c, `pss` cmd wired) but the periodic small-signal solver is absent.

rows.feature: Pnoise / phase-noise (oscillator, mixer) + PM/AM decomposition
rows.notes: Cyclostationary noise around the periodic operating point — the headline RF-noise deliverable (oscillator phase noise, mixer NF).

rows.notes_zh: 週期性工作點附近的循環穩態 (cyclostationary) 雜訊——RF 雜訊的旗艦交付項（振盪器相位雜訊、mixer NF）。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] Pnoise: PSS base exists; the phase-noise solver is absent.

rows.feature: QPSS / QPAC / QPnoise (quasi-periodic, multi-tone mixers)
rows.notes: Multi-fundamental analyses — layer only after single-tone PSS/HB/Pnoise land.

rows.notes_zh: 多基頻分析——僅在單音調 PSS/HB/Pnoise 落地後再疊加。

rows.notes_zh: 透過 analog-extraction-resim skill 提供（佈局前/後規格比較）。

rows.notes: Robust flat-DSPF ingest (coupling caps, distributed RC) so large extracted decks parse cleanly.

rows.reclass_note: [LEDGER-ERROR-ROW-REWRITTEN] Row said 'harden DSPF reader' but grep dspf|spef over src/ = 0 — NO reader exists. The real work is to IMPLEMENT a flat-DSPF ingest (bug-fix -> feature-add), not harden a nonexistent one. Stays OPEN under the corrected description.
rows.done_note: vibeic_proofs/check_enh68.sh <patched-ngspice> <stock-ngspice>  (proof68_flat.dspf + proof68_malformed.dspf) | NEG: Three malformed DSPFs are each REJECTED as a hard error with no marker and no output file: (a) a truncated card (missing value), (b) a non-numeric ele

rows.feature: Parasitic RC reduction (TICER / model-order reduction) for tractable post-layout resim
rows.notes: Reduce huge RC networks before solve; overlaps the fast-SPICE partitioning lever (#14).

rows.notes_zh: 在求解前縮減龐大的 RC 網路；與 fast-SPICE 分割槓桿 (#14) 有重疊。

rows.feature: PATH packaging — ngspice on /foss/tools/bin (symlink)
rows.notes: Dockerfile runtime stage; verified vibeic-eda:0.2.3 (which ngspice → /foss/tools/bin/ngspice).
rows.feature_zh: PATH 打包——ngspice 置於 /foss/tools/bin（symlink）
rows.notes_zh: Dockerfile runtime 階段；已於 vibeic-eda:0.2.3 驗證（which ngspice → /foss/tools/bin/ngspice）。

rows.feature: Non-login docker exec PATH (global ENV PATH)
rows.notes: Dockerfile global ENV PATH (vibeic-eda:0.2.12) so bare docker exec … ngspice resolves.
rows.feature_zh: 非登入式 docker exec 的 PATH（全域 ENV PATH）
rows.notes_zh: Dockerfile 全域 ENV PATH（vibeic-eda:0.2.12），讓純 docker exec … ngspice 能解析到。

rows.feature: Multi-process Monte-Carlo / PVT-corner run fan-out
rows.commercial: Cadence Spectre X & Synopsys FastSPICE (CustomSim) multicore
rows.notes: Device-model evaluation is already OpenMP-parallel inside ngspice (bsim3/bsim4/... b*ld.c carry #pragma omp parallel for). The high-ROI un-done win is at the AMS harness: Monte-Carlo trials and PVT-corner points are fully independent, so fan them out as N concurrent ngspice processes (eda_spice_corner / ams-sim runner) instead of running them serially. Embarrassingly parallel, near-linear scaling, forkable at the runner without touching ngspice internals.
rows.feature_zh: 多行程 Monte-Carlo／PVT-corner 執行 fan-out
rows.notes_zh: ngspice 內部的 device model 評估已 OpenMP 平行（bsim3/bsim4/... b*ld.c 帶 #pragma omp parallel for）。高回報的未完成項在 AMS harness：Monte-Carlo 試驗與 PVT-corner 點彼此完全獨立，應把它們以 N 個並行 ngspice process fan-out（eda_spice_corner / ams-sim runner），而非序列跑。屬 embarrassingly parallel、近線性加速，可在 runner 層 fork、無需動 ngspice 內部。

rows.feature: Parallel sparse-matrix factorization (single-run transient)
rows.notes: A single transient run's wall-clock is dominated by the serial sparse-matrix factorization (Sparse1.3, optional KLU); timesteps are causally sequential and cannot be parallelized across time. Multi-core matrix solve (parallel KLU / NicSLU) or FastSPICE-style circuit partitioning is a large algorithmic effort with small payoff for our one-node analog blocks — the MC/corner fan-out (PLL1) already captures most of the achievable speedup. Defer.
rows.feature_zh: 平行稀疏矩陣分解（單次 transient）
rows.notes_zh: 單次 transient 的 wall-clock 由序列稀疏矩陣分解（Sparse1.3、選配 KLU）主宰；時間步具因果序、無法跨時間平行。多核矩陣解（parallel KLU / NicSLU）或 FastSPICE 式電路切割對我們的單一節點 analog block 是大工程小回報——MC/corner fan-out（PLL1）已取得大部分可達加速。Defer。

ngspice.summary_zh: 類比 / 混合訊號 SPICE（外加 xschem 電路圖擷取）。原生 Monte-Carlo / LHS、批次誠實標記 (batch-honesty markers)、同倫法 (homotopy) 與 OSDI 元件模型皆已完成；最主要的待辦項目為 JSON --measure 附屬輸出檔與原生 corner-sweep 卡，接著是相關性製程+失配 (mismatch) Monte-Carlo、fast-SPICE，以及一套 RF 穩態分析套件 (PSS/HB/Pnoise)。

iverilog.summary: Event-driven 4-state RTL / gate-level simulator (vvp). Genuine 4-state X-prop and gate-level sim are baseline assets; open engine gaps are specify-block/timing-check GLS, SDF INTERCONNECT, native code coverage, and the -t null elaborate<->codegen parity sweep. UVM/CRV/coverage are intentionally answered by the verification stack.

rows.notes: Was sorry: Assignment to an entire array … not yet supported; already in upstream v14.0-devel — proven on stock (decl-init + procedural PASS). Retires roadmap §2.5 row-1 FLOOR-D.

rows.notes_zh: 原本會出現 sorry: Assignment to an entire array … not yet supported；上游 v14.0-devel 已具備——已在原版上驗證（宣告初始化 + 程序式皆 PASS）。使 roadmap §2.5 第 1 列 FLOOR-D 退場。

rows.notes_zh: 原本會出現 sorry: break statements not supported；上游已具備（已驗證 sum=4 PASS）。使 §2.5 第 2 列退場。

rows.feature: Comp-unit package-before-import ordering — driver hoists all *pkg*.sv before other files
rows.commercial: VCS/Xcelium treat all files as one comp unit w/ two-pass resolution
rows.notes: Fork e1e12f6. use-before-decl: stock syntax error / Invalid module item rc=2 → patched WIDTH=16 PASS; comment/string-skip negative control holds.
rows.feature_zh: 編譯單元 (comp-unit) 的 package-先於-import 排序——driver 將所有 *pkg*.sv 提前 (hoist) 至其他檔案之前
rows.notes_zh: Fork e1e12f6。先用後宣告 (use-before-decl)：原版報 syntax error / Invalid module item rc=2 → 修補後 WIDTH=16 PASS；註解/字串略過的負向對照維持正確。

rows.feature: True comp-unit-wide two-pass symbol/package resolution in the frontend (order-independent, no driver hoist)
rows.commercial: VCS/Xcelium collect all package decls before resolving any import
rows.notes: The e1e12f6 driver-hoist is a workaround; the general fix collects all package/typedef decls in a pre-pass so any file order resolves. Dissolves the hoist heuristic; also fixes cross-package :: chains.
rows.feature_zh: 前端中真正跨編譯單元的雙階段符號/package 解析（與檔案順序無關、不靠 driver 提前）
rows.notes_zh: e1e12f6 的 driver-hoist 只是權宜之計；通用的修法在前置階段收集所有 package/typedef 宣告，使任何檔案順序皆能解析。可消除 hoist 啟發式；同時修正跨 package 的 :: 鏈。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] true comp-unit-wide two-pass symbol/package resolution — a frontend restructure.

rows.feature: Full SV classes / OOP (inheritance, virtual methods, polymorphism, this, parameterized classes, extends)
rows.notes: iverilog class support partial; large frontend + vvp object-model work. (stack-covered ↗ pyuvm/cocotb do the OOP TB layer) — low priority for the engine itself.
rows.feature_zh: 完整 SV class / OOP（繼承、虛擬方法、多型、this、參數化 class、extends）
rows.notes_zh: iverilog 的 class 支援不完整；需大量前端 + vvp 物件模型工作。（由堆疊涵蓋 ↗ pyuvm/cocotb 負責 OOP 的 TB 層）——對引擎本身而言優先度低。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD, RESIDUAL NARROWED] Basic class/new/members/methods WORK (verified by running); ONLY virtual-dispatch polymorphism fails (b.kind() returned 'base'). The residual is virtual/inheritance dispatch, not whole-class support — a narrower gap than the row implied.

rows.feature: Constrained randomization — rand/randc/constraint/std::randomize/solve…before/dist/inside
rows.notes: Needs a SAT/BDD constraint solver in the runtime. (stack-covered ↗ pyuvm + cocotb Python constraint solver) — deprioritized; forking a solver into vvp duplicates the stack.
rows.feature_zh: 受約束隨機化 (Constrained randomization)——rand/randc/constraint/std::randomize/solve…before/dist/inside
rows.notes_zh: 需在 runtime 中加入 SAT/BDD 約束求解器。（由堆疊涵蓋 ↗ pyuvm + cocotb 的 Python 約束求解器）——已降低優先度；把求解器 fork 進 vvp 會與堆疊重複。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] Constrained randomization: 'Constraint declarations not supported' — a from-scratch rand/randc/constraint solver stack.

rows.feature: Dynamic arrays / queues / associative arrays + built-in methods (.push_back/.size/.delete/.exists)
rows.notes: iverilog partial; complete the vvp runtime container types + method set. Real value for self-checking TBs that don't use the Python stack.
rows.feature_zh: 動態陣列 / queue / 關聯陣列 + 內建方法（.push_back/.size/.delete/.exists）
rows.notes_zh: iverilog 部分支援；需補完 vvp runtime 的容器型別 + 方法集。對不使用 Python 堆疊的自我檢查 TB 有實質價值。
rows.reclass_note: [ALREADY-WORKS] Dynamic arrays / queues work — verified by running.

rows.feature: Interfaces + modports + virtual interfaces + clocking blocks
rows.notes: iverilog partial (virtual interfaces weak). Clocking blocks matter for cycle-accurate TB sampling semantics.
rows.feature_zh: Interface + modport + virtual interface + clocking block
rows.notes_zh: iverilog 部分支援（virtual interface 較弱）。clocking block 對 cycle-accurate 的 TB 取樣語意很重要。
rows.reclass_note: [ALREADY-WORKS] Interfaces / modports / virtual interfaces work — verified by running.

rows.feature: bind, checker, let, program blocks, $unit scope
rows.notes: bind is the highest-value of this group (attach assertions/monitors without editing DUT).
rows.feature_zh: bind、checker、let、program block、$unit scope
rows.notes_zh: 本組中 bind 價值最高（不需修改 DUT 即可附掛 assertion/monitor）。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] bind: K_bind token exists but NO grammar rule -> syntax error; needs a full bind/checker grammar+elaboration.

rows.feature: Streaming operators {<<{}} / {>>{}}, packed-struct/union method completeness, enum methods
rows.notes: Common in packet/serializer TBs; partial today → occasional elaborate sorry.
rows.feature_zh: Streaming 運算子 {<<{}} / {>>{}}、packed-struct/union 方法完整性、enum 方法
rows.notes_zh: 常見於封包/serializer TB；目前部分支援 → 偶爾在 elaborate 時出現 sorry。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] streaming operators: no PExpr node + grammar drops slice_size; a new expression node + elaboration.

rows.feature: ->> nonblocking event trigger — vvp codegen segfault
rows.commercial: VCS/Xcelium schedule NB events in the correct region
rows.notes: Fork 110cadd (3 root bugs: nodangle nb-trig, stale sorry, schedule_propagate). Stock SEGFAULT rc=139 → patched rc=0 hits=2 PASS; full regress SV 902/908 + Verilog 1765/1768 0 regressions.
rows.feature_zh: ->> 非阻塞事件觸發——vvp codegen segfault
rows.notes_zh: Fork 110cadd（3 個根因 bug：nodangle nb-trig、殘留 sorry、schedule_propagate）。原版 SEGFAULT rc=139 → 修補後 rc=0 hits=2 PASS；完整回歸 SV 902/908 + Verilog 1765/1768，0 個回歸。

rows.feature: Core event controls: #delay, #0, intra-assignment delay, named events, ->, wait, fork/join/join_any/join_none
rows.notes: vvp baseline — supported.
rows.feature_zh: 核心事件控制：#delay、#0、指派內延遲 (intra-assignment delay)、named event、->、wait、fork/join/join_any/join_none
rows.notes_zh: vvp 基礎能力——已支援。

rows.feature: Full IEEE-1800 event-region model (Active / Inactive / NBA / Observed / Reactive / Postponed / Re-NBA / Re-Inactive)
rows.commercial: VCS scheduler defines the reference race/CDC semantics
rows.notes: vvp uses a simplified region model → a race-sensitive TB can order differently than VCS. This is the deep "event-region scheduler parity" port; published semantics exist but it's a runtime rewrite. Highest-effort deferred item.
rows.feature_zh: 完整 IEEE-1800 事件區域 (event-region) 模型（Active / Inactive / NBA / Observed / Reactive / Postponed / Re-NBA / Re-Inactive）
rows.notes_zh: vvp 採用簡化的區域模型 → 對競態敏感的 TB 其排序可能與 VCS 不同。這是深層的「event-region 排程器對等性」移植；語意已有公開發表，但屬於 runtime 重寫。工作量最高的延後項目。

rows.feature: disable fork / wait fork complete semantics; process control (kill/await)
rows.notes: Partial today; matters for structured concurrent TBs.
rows.feature_zh: disable fork / wait fork 完成語意；行程控制 (kill/await)
rows.notes_zh: 目前部分支援；對結構化並行 TB 很重要。
rows.reclass_note: [ALREADY-WORKS] disable fork / wait-fork works — verified by running; it was on the DEFER list by mistake, it is NOT a gap.

rows.feature: Immediate assertions assert/assume/cover (+ $error/$fatal actions)
rows.notes: iverilog: partial (only "supported-assertions" elaborated, else parsed-and-ignored). Verilator: has immediate assert. Complete iverilog immediate-assertion action blocks.
rows.feature_zh: 立即斷言 (Immediate assertions) assert/assume/cover（+ $error/$fatal 動作）
rows.notes_zh: iverilog：部分支援（僅「supported-assertions」會被 elaborate，其餘解析後忽略）。Verilator：具備立即 assert。需補完 iverilog 的立即斷言動作區塊。
rows.reclass_note: [ALREADY-WORKS] Immediate assertions work default-on: a failing assert fires $error with msg+time+scope. Proven by running, not asserted.

rows.feature: Concurrent / temporal SVA — sequences, properties, |-> |=> ##N throughout within s_eventually
rows.notes: Neither engine has full native temporal SVA. (stack-covered ↗ sby/SymbiYosys proves SVA formally) — building a temporal matcher into vvp duplicates the formal path; keep low.
rows.feature_zh: 並行 / 時序 SVA——sequence、property、|-> |=> ##N throughout within s_eventually
rows.notes_zh: 兩個引擎都沒有完整的原生時序 SVA。（由堆疊涵蓋 ↗ sby/SymbiYosys 以形式方法證明 SVA）——把時序 matcher 建進 vvp 會與形式路徑重複；維持低優先度。

rows.feature: Assertion/cover property coverage counts + pass/fail DB
rows.commercial: VCS/Xcelium/Questa assertion coverage in the coverage DB
rows.notes: Depends on #22 + a coverage DB (#28/#29). Deferred behind those.
rows.feature_zh: 斷言/cover property 的覆蓋計數 + pass/fail 資料庫
rows.notes_zh: 相依於 #22 + 一個覆蓋率資料庫 (#28/#29)。排在其後延後處理。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] concurrent assertion / cover property counts — new-construct stack.

rows.feature: Full UVM 1.2 / IEEE-1800.2 base-class library (factory, phasing, sequences, RAL, TLM)
rows.commercial: VCS/Xcelium/Questa ship native UVM + protocol VIP
rows.notes: Requires full OOP (#5) + CRV (#6) + coverage first. (stack-covered ↗ pyuvm IS the Vibe-IC UVM answer) — an EXTERNAL-by-design decision, not an engine fork target.
rows.feature_zh: 完整 UVM 1.2 / IEEE-1800.2 base-class 函式庫（factory、phasing、sequence、RAL、TLM）
rows.notes_zh: 需先具備完整 OOP (#5) + CRV (#6) + 覆蓋率。（由堆疊涵蓋 ↗ pyuvm 即 Vibe-IC 的 UVM 解答）——這是設計上刻意外部化的決定，並非引擎 fork 的目標。

rows.feature: iverilog native code coverage (line / branch / toggle / FSM-state / condition)
rows.notes: iverilog has no native code coverage → benchmark "code-coverage ≥90%" pillar leans entirely on the Verilator path. Add vvp instrumentation counters. Real benchmark-score lever.
rows.feature_zh: iverilog 原生程式碼覆蓋率（line / branch / toggle / FSM-state / condition）
rows.notes_zh: iverilog 無原生程式碼覆蓋率 → benchmark 的「code-coverage ≥90%」支柱完全依賴 Verilator 路徑。需加入 vvp 插樁 (instrumentation) 計數器。是實實在在的 benchmark 分數槓桿。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] native line/branch/toggle coverage instrumentation — new runtime counters + DB emission.

rows.feature: iverilog VPI / PLI 1.0 / acc / tf foreign interface
rows.notes: iverilog VPI is a baseline strength (full $dumpvars, cocotb rides it). No fork work.
rows.feature_zh: iverilog VPI / PLI 1.0 / acc / tf 外部介面
rows.notes_zh: iverilog 的 VPI 是基礎強項（完整 $dumpvars，cocotb 依此運作）。無需 fork 工作。

rows.feature: DPI-C import/export incl. open arrays, context, scope, svGetScope
rows.commercial: VCS/Xcelium/Questa full DPI incl. open-array + context
rows.notes: Both engines do basic DPI-C; open-array/context/svScope completeness is partial. Value for C-model co-sim.
rows.feature_zh: DPI-C import/export 含 open array、context、scope、svGetScope
rows.notes_zh: 兩個引擎皆支援基本 DPI-C；open-array/context/svScope 的完整性尚不足。對 C 模型協同模擬有價值。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] DPI-C: 'DPI' absent from parse.y entirely — a from-scratch import/export + C ABI layer.

rows.feature: iverilog/vvp multicore (interpreter is single-threaded)
rows.notes: Parallelizing an event-driven interpreter is a research port; the Verilator --threads path already covers speed-critical cycle sim, so this is a low-value deferred item, not a blocker.
rows.feature_zh: iverilog/vvp 多核（直譯器為單執行緒）
rows.notes_zh: 將事件驅動直譯器平行化屬研究級移植；速度關鍵的 cycle sim 已由 Verilator --threads 路徑涵蓋，故此為低價值的延後項目，並非阻礙。

rows.feature: Save / restore / checkpoint (snapshot sim state, resume; incremental regression)
rows.commercial: VCS save/restore · Xcelium save/restart · Questa checkpoint
rows.notes: Neither engine can checkpoint. Serializing full vvp/Verilated state is real work; low benchmark value → deferred behind everything else.
rows.feature_zh: 存檔 / 還原 / checkpoint（快照模擬狀態、續跑；增量回歸）
rows.notes_zh: 兩個引擎都無法 checkpoint。序列化完整的 vvp/Verilated 狀態工作量實在不小；benchmark 價值低 → 排在所有項目之後延後。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] save/restore checkpoint: '$save not available' — snapshot of full vvp runtime state.

rows.feature: iverilog true 4-state gate-level sim (X/Z faithful, std-cell netlist)
rows.notes: Genuine iverilog asset vs Verilator's 2-state — the reason gate-level sign-off sim routes to iverilog. Preserve.
rows.feature_zh: iverilog 真正的 4-state 閘級模擬（X/Z 忠實、標準單元 netlist）
rows.notes_zh: 相對於 Verilator 的 2-state，這是 iverilog 真正的資產——正是閘級簽核模擬導向 iverilog 的原因。應予保留。

rows.feature: iverilog specify blocks + module path delays -- -gspecify, (a=>b) path delays, and specify pulse control
rows.commercial: VCS/Xcelium/Questa specify-block delay sim with PATHPULSE$ pulse control
rows.notes: Module path delays are COMPLETE and simulate correctly to the timestep: simple (a=>y), full connection (a*>y) incl. vectors, edge-sensitive (posedge clk => (q +: d)) with +:/-:, state-dependent if(cond) and ifnone, polarity (a+=>y), specparam-valued delays, 2/6/12-value delay lists, and multi-source/multi-dest (a,b *> y,z) -- all verified against hand-computed delays. The earlier "complete the specify path-delay set" framing overstated the gap. The real residual is PULSE CONTROL, and every part of it is accepted-then-ignored: PATHPULSE$ and PATHPULSEPERCENT are parsed and discarded (pulses are instead filtered by the default limit, which is the path delay), and pulsestyle_onevent / pulsestyle_ondetect / showcancelled / noshowcancelled are likewise parsed and dropped. As of fork 6692428 all of them WARN rather than mislead -- PATHPULSE$ was previously discarded SILENTLY, and the pulsestyle group previously reported under the incorrect message "Timing checks are not supported" although none of them is a timing check -- but none is implemented. Implementing pulse control spans parse.y -> pform -> elaborate -> NetModPath -> ivl_target -> tgt-vvp .modpath -> vvp runtime; ivl_target.h and netlist.h have no pulse concept at all, the .modpath directive has no slot for limits, and vvp_fun_modpath keeps a single pending value with no event list or cancellation, so the standard's suppress/X/propagate rule needs that scheduler restructured rather than parameterised.
rows.feature_zh: iverilog specify block + path (IOPATH) 延遲——-gspecify、(a=>b) module-path 延遲
rows.notes_zh: 最新快照支援*部分*路徑型別；需補完 specify path-delay 集合，使佈局後閘級 netlist 能帶單元延遲進行模擬。矽價值高（佈局後 GLS）。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] real PATHPULSE$ pulse-limit enforcement is a vvp RUNTIME REDESIGN (the silent-discard is already converted to a loud warning; the enforcement itself remains). Not session-sized.

rows.feature: iverilog timing checks — $setup/$hold/$width/$recovery/$removal/$skew + notifier→X on violation
rows.notes: Partial today. The notifier→X mechanism is exactly how a real GLS flags setup/hold violations; pairs with #36 to make iverilog a credible sign-off GLS engine.
rows.feature_zh: iverilog 時序檢查——$setup/$hold/$width/$recovery/$removal/$skew + 違反時 notifier→X
rows.notes_zh: 目前部分支援。notifier→X 機制正是真實 GLS 標示 setup/hold 違反的方式；與 #36 搭配可讓 iverilog 成為可信的簽核 GLS 引擎。
rows.reclass_note: [ALGORITHM-HARD] timing checks $setup/$hold/$width: CONFIRMED a violating $width pulse fires nothing; needs a full new-construct stack — the SDF machinery does NOT shorten it.

rows.feature: iverilog 4-state runtime X-propagation (pessimistic, IEEE-correct)
rows.commercial: VCS Xprop / Xcelium X-prop / Questa X-prop
rows.notes: iverilog is genuinely 4-state → X-prop is a baseline asset. Where X-pessimism matters (reset/CDC/GLS), route to iverilog.
rows.feature_zh: iverilog 4-state runtime X 傳播（悲觀式、符合 IEEE）
rows.notes_zh: iverilog 確為 4-state → X 傳播是基礎資產。在 X 悲觀性重要之處（reset/CDC/GLS），導向 iverilog。

rows.feature: iverilog $sdf_annotate — IOPATH + INTERCONNECT delay annotation onto a gate netlist
rows.notes: iverilog SDF support is weak (GSoC-2023 brought IOPATH + partial INTERCONNECT for OpenLane GLS). Complete INTERCONNECT + min:typ:max triplet selection → real post-layout timing sim. Groundwork exists — bounded medium/hard. | SUB-PROGRESS (commit 06b964c): conditional IOPATH now annotated for the UNAMBIGUOUS case ((COND ...)/(CONDELSE ...) were parsed-then-DISCARDED, silent by default). Single-modpath match -> annotated with its runtime condition_flag_; >1 match -> SKIPPED+warned, never mis-annotated. Gate sdf_cond hand-computed COND 1->7 / CONDELSE 2->5, proven-negative ambiguous cell declines. The AMBIGUOUS remainder stays OPEN: VPI exposes no modpath condition (vvp stores it as a live net, not a comparable expr).
rows.feature_zh: iverilog $sdf_annotate——將 IOPATH + INTERCONNECT 延遲回標至閘級 netlist
rows.notes_zh: iverilog 的 SDF 支援較弱（GSoC-2023 為 OpenLane GLS 帶入 IOPATH + 部分 INTERCONNECT）。補完 INTERCONNECT + min:typ:max 三元組選擇 → 真正的佈局後時序模擬。基礎已具備——難度中/難但有界。

rows.feature: $dumpvars forward-reference elaboration (name a module-scope wire declared textually later)
rows.commercial: VCS/Xcelium bind dump args after full-scope build
rows.notes: Fork bedf375. Icarus-14 regression: $dumpvars(1,<wire>,…) on a later-declared wire failed Unable to bind wire/reg/memory; v11 accepted it. Fix defers $dumpvars arg binding until the scope symbol table is built. vibe-ic #125 · vibeic/iverilog PR#1 (built+verified, ivtest added, 1766/1769 regress). Dissolves the scorer's masked dump-strip workaround (v1.3.86).
rows.feature_zh: $dumpvars 前向參照 elaboration（引用在文字上稍後才宣告的 module-scope wire）
rows.notes_zh: Fork bedf375。Icarus-14 回歸：$dumpvars(1,<wire>,…) 若指向稍後才宣告的 wire 會失敗於 Unable to bind wire/reg/memory；v11 可接受。修法將 $dumpvars 引數綁定延後至 scope 符號表建好之後。vibe-ic #125 · vibeic/iverilog PR#1（已建置+驗證、已加 ivtest、回歸 1766/1769）。消除 scorer 的遮罩式 dump-strip 權宜做法 (v1.3.86)。

rows.feature: iverilog waveform: VCD + LXT2 + FST dump (vvp -fst)
rows.commercial: VCS FSDB / Verdi · Xcelium SHM · Questa WLF
rows.notes: Baseline (FST via GtkWave/Surfer). Open-format asset; no fork work.
rows.feature_zh: iverilog 波形：VCD + LXT2 + FST dump（vvp -fst）
rows.notes_zh: 基礎能力（FST 透過 GtkWave/Surfer）。開放格式資產；無需 fork 工作。

rows.feature: Integrated debug — waveform + driver/load tracing, active-annotation, value backtrace, schematic
rows.commercial: Synopsys Verdi (FSDB active-annotation, driver-trace) · Cadence SimVision · Siemens Visualizer
rows.notes: No OSS engine ships a Verdi-class integrated debugger. (stack-covered ↗ GtkWave/Surfer + cocotb Python introspection) — EXTERNAL-by-design for the engines; not a fork target.
rows.feature_zh: 整合式除錯——波形 + driver/load 追蹤、active-annotation、數值回溯 (backtrace)、電路圖
rows.notes_zh: 沒有任何 OSS 引擎隨附 Verdi 等級的整合式除錯器。（由堆疊涵蓋 ↗ GtkWave/Surfer + cocotb 的 Python 內省）——對引擎而言為設計上刻意外部化；非 fork 目標。

rows.feature: Interactive run-time debug — force/release, deposit, breakpoint/step (vvp interactive mode)
rows.notes: vvp has a partial interactive mode; low value vs the batch+waveform flow. Deferred.
rows.feature_zh: 互動式 run-time 除錯——force/release、deposit、breakpoint/step（vvp 互動模式）
rows.notes_zh: vvp 有部分互動模式；相對於 batch+波形流程價值較低。延後處理。

rows.feature: iverilog -t null elaborate ↔ vvp codegen parity (a source that elaborates must also emit)
rows.notes: §2.5 row-5: -t null OK but -o sim.vvp fails on the same source → a whole "elaborate-passes-codegen-fails" FLOOR-D class. Audit tgt-null vs tgt-vvp95; the 110cadd fix closed one instance — sweep for the rest. Lowest effort, retires a benchmark FLOOR class → P0.
rows.feature_zh: iverilog -t null elaborate ↔ vvp codegen 對等性（能 elaborate 的原始碼也必須能產出）
rows.notes_zh: §2.5 第 5 列：-t null 可過但同一份原始碼 -o sim.vvp 失敗 → 整個「elaborate 過但 codegen 失敗」的 FLOOR-D 類別。稽核 tgt-null vs tgt-vvp95；110cadd 修正已關閉一個案例——把其餘的一併掃查。工作量最低、可使一個 benchmark FLOOR 類別退場 → P0。

rows.feature: Event-driven engine is serial; parallel win = regression/seed fan-out
rows.commercial: Cadence Xcelium / Synopsys VCS multicore + parallel regression grids
rows.notes: vvp is a single event-driven engine; its 'vthreads' are cooperative green threads for Verilog processes (not OS parallelism), and the global time-ordered event queue is inherently serial — parallel-event simulation yields little at typical block sizes. The real parallel win for iverilog users is running independent sims/seeds concurrently, which lands at the eda_simulate / cocotb harness (see cocotb PLL1), not inside vvp. No fork-internal threading.
rows.feature_zh: 事件驅動引擎為序列；平行點在 regression／seed fan-out
rows.notes_zh: vvp 是單一事件驅動引擎；其 'vthreads' 是給 Verilog process 的協作式 green thread（非 OS 平行），全域時間序事件佇列本質序列——在一般 block 尺寸下平行事件模擬效益小。iverilog 使用者真正的平行點是並行跑獨立 sim/seed，落在 eda_simulate／cocotb harness（見 cocotb PLL1）而非 vvp 內。fork 內不做執行緒化。

iverilog.summary_zh: 事件驅動的 4-state RTL / 閘級模擬器 (vvp)。真正的 4-state X 傳播與閘級模擬屬基礎資產；引擎面待補的缺口為 specify-block/timing-check 的 GLS、SDF INTERCONNECT、原生程式碼覆蓋率，以及 -t null 的 elaborate↔codegen 對等性 (parity) 掃查。UVM/CRV/覆蓋率則刻意交由驗證堆疊 (verification stack) 處理。

areas_zh.Event-driven scheduling (iverilog / vvp: 事件驅動排程（iverilog / vvp runtime）

rows.feature: Functional coverage — covergroup/coverpoint/cross are PARSED then IGNORED ENTIRELY
rows.notes: MEASURED on Verilator 5.048 (not inferred): the row's 'partial covergroup support' was too generous. A covergroup with a clocking event, two coverpoints with explicit bins and a cross emits COVERIGN on ALL of them ('Ignoring unsupported: coverage clocking event / cover bin specification x2 / coverpoint x2 / cover cross') and exits 0; with --coverage the generated C++ carries line/toggle inserts and ZERO points from the covergroup. THE FAILURE MODE IS SILENT — the SV compiles, runs, and collects nothing, so a green build reads as 'functional coverage collected'. That is worse than an outright error. Real covergroup support (bins, ignore/illegal, cross, at_least/weight, sampling semantics, DB emission) is a substantial V3 front-end + runtime feature, not session-sized. STACK-COVERED in the meantime by our cocotb-coverage fork: ignore/illegal bins (V10), transition coverage (V11), parallel merge (PLL1), closure over a merged DB (V35). Open and de-prioritized — but open on the basis 'ignored entirely', not 'partially supported'.
rows.feature_zh: Functional coverage covergroup／coverpoint／cross 搭配 coverage DB
rows.notes_zh: Verilator 具部分 covergroup 支援（近期 #7853／#7889 covergroup-formal-param 修正已納入我們的 base tip）；iverilog 則無。（已由 stack 涵蓋 ↗ cocotb-coverage）——降低優先度。
rows.reclass_note: [EXT-CEILING] Coverage-DB (UCIS/UCDB) is external-by-design for the OSS stack; the functional-coverage capability is STACK-COVERED by our cocotb-coverage fork (rank/merge/closure landed there). The residual inside verilator is a large V3Covergroup runtime feature-add, not a localized FAIL->PASS — belongs-elsewhere, gated in the coverage tool, not verilator.

rows.feature: No SELECTIVE VPI exposure — whole-design (--public-flat-rw) or nothing
rows.notes: ROW REWRITTEN: the previous premise DOES NOT REPRODUCE on Verilator 5.048, measured by counting VPI varInsert registrations in the generated C++. (a) 'no arbitrary internal-signal access' is FALSE — with --vpi --public-flat-rw a non-port internal signal IS registered (7 varInsert covering clk, d, q AND internal_sig). (b) 'no full hierarchy walk' is FALSE — on a 3-level design 14 varInsert cover leaf_internal and mid_internal, and the Syms table registers distinct scopes 'hier.u_mid' and 'hier.u_mid.u_leaf'. (c) THE REAL LIMITATION, which the old row never stated: --vpi ALONE registers ZERO variables — not even top-level ports. So VPI is all-or-nothing at whole-design granularity, with the code-size and optimization cost that implies and no selective per-signal exposure short of source annotation. That is a deliberate performance tradeoff in Verilator's design rather than a missing capability, which makes it a WEAK fork candidate. Deferred against the corrected text; do not fork against the old one.
rows.feature_zh: Verilator VPI 完整度（目前僅 public-signal --public，無完整階層走訪）
rows.notes_zh: Verilator VPI 受限（需 --vpi + --public-flat-rw）；無法任意存取內部訊號。cocotb-on-Verilator 會遇到此限制。應擴大所暴露的 VPI 物件集合。

No honest fix → no patch (correctly). Handled plugin-side by demoting the lint gate to advisory for iverilog-scored benchmarks.

rows.feature: Solver scalability on wide/relational domains (O(1)-memory sampling)
rows.notes: python-constraint backtracking OOM'd on wide domains (it materialized the full solution set). Fixed by streaming getSolutionIter + Algorithm-R reservoir sampling = a uniform pick in O(1) memory (stock 51 MB peak vs patched under 2 MB at 400x400, tracemalloc-gated); the distribution path is untouched. An SMT/boolector backend was NOT required -- the scalability goal is met within python-constraint.
rows.feature_zh: 超越 python-constraint 的求解器擴展性 (SMT/boolector 後端)
rows.notes_zh: python-constraint 是回溯法 — 窄欄位沒問題，寬／關聯型則較弱。誠實的選項：(a) 🔷 增強 crv，把寬問題外送給 yosys-SAT/boolector (yosys 為我們自有)；(b) ⚪ 採用 PyVSC (boolector 後端的 CRV)。先交付 V13；只在卡住之處才升級。

rows.feature: Cross-run coverage-DB MERGE (merge functional coverage across seeds/tests)
rows.commercial: Questa UCDB merge · Verdi/VCS unified coverage merge
rows.notes: cocotb-coverage ships merge_coverage(logger, out, *files) + export_to_xml/yaml — BAKED, unused. Wire: each run exports its DB, a merge step unions them, closure is measured on the MERGED DB not a single run. Foundational for metric-driven verification. Wiring-level.
rows.feature_zh: 跨執行的 coverage-DB 合併 (跨 seed/test 合併 functional coverage)
rows.notes_zh: cocotb-coverage 內建 merge_coverage(logger, out, *files) + export_to_xml/yaml — 已內建、未使用。接線方式：每次執行匯出自己的 DB，合併步驟取其聯集，closure 以合併後的 DB 而非單次執行來衡量。是 metric 驅動驗證的基礎。屬接線層級。
rows.reclass_note: [PLUGIN-WIRING-NOT-FORK] RE-VERIFIED by reading coverage.py, not assumed. Cross-run coverage-DB merge is baked: merge_coverage(logger, merged_file_name, *files) at cocotb_coverage/coverage.py:933 (master line numbering), handling both XML and YAML, summing per-bin hits and recursively updating parent coverage/size/cover_percentage; the exporters that feed it are CoverageDB.export_to_yaml at coverage.py:103 and CoverageDB.

rows.feature: Unified coverage DB (functional + code + assertion + formal-cover)
rows.notes: One report joining cocotb-coverage (functional, V8/V33), Verilator (code, V12), SVA cover (V16/V24), and formal-unreachable exclusions (V26). Our own JSON schema ("L28-merged"); no encrypted format needed.
rows.feature_zh: 統一 coverage DB (functional + code + assertion + formal-cover)
rows.notes_zh: 一份報告串接 cocotb-coverage (functional，V8/V33)、Verilator (code，V12)、SVA cover (V16/V24) 與 formal-unreachable 排除項 (V26)。使用我們自有的 JSON schema (「L28-merged」)；不需加密格式。
rows.reclass_note: [PLUGIN-WIRING-NOT-FORK] Checked for a library-sized piece and found none. A unified DB joining functional + code + assertion + formal-cover is a schema decision over four artifacts, three of which the library has no concept of: no code coverage (see V12 grep, 0 hits), no formal-cover, and assertion coverage is only the user-level CoverCheck/CoverPoint pattern shown at documentation/source/tutorials.rst:380 and :420 - all

rows.feature: Coverage-closure gate + vplan mapping (goals→coverage, % closure, uncovered-bin report)
rows.notes: verification_plan.json + closure_policy{functional_bins_required_pct:100} are EMITTED but no gate RUNS the merged DB and blocks on closure. Add a coverage_closure_check gate reading V33/V34 → PASS only at target, uncovered bins listed (formal-excluded via V26).
rows.feature_zh: Coverage-closure gate + vplan 對映 (目標→coverage、closure %、未涵蓋 bin 報告)
rows.notes_zh: verification_plan.json + closure_policy{functional_bins_required_pct:100} 已產出，但沒有 gate 會跑合併後的 DB 並在未達 closure 時擋下。新增一個讀取 V33/V34 的 coverage_closure_check gate → 只有達標才 PASS，列出未涵蓋的 bin (經 V26 formal 排除者除外)。

rows.feature: Test ranking / grading (which tests add unique coverage)
rows.notes: Rank runs by marginal coverage on the merged DB; prune redundant seeds. Follows V33.
rows.feature_zh: Test 排名 / 評分 (哪些 test 增加了獨有的 coverage)
rows.notes_zh: 依合併後 DB 上的邊際 coverage 為各次執行排名；剔除多餘的 seed。接續 V33。

rows.feature: Parallel coverage-database merge (tree-reduce)
rows.commercial: Cadence IMC / vManager parallel coverage merge
rows.notes: Coverage collection happens inside the (serial) simulation, but merging many per-run coverage databases is a map-reduce that is embarrassingly parallel and currently serial in coverage.py. Add a multiprocessing tree-reduce (parallel partial merges, then combine) for large regression coverage rollups. Modest, but real for big seed sweeps where the serial merge becomes a tail-latency bottleneck.
rows.feature_zh: 平行 coverage 資料庫合併（tree-reduce）
rows.notes_zh: coverage 收集在（序列的）模擬內進行，但合併眾多每次執行的 coverage database 是 map-reduce、屬 embarrassingly parallel，coverage.py 目前為序列。可加 multiprocessing tree-reduce（平行部分合併再彙整）處理大型 regression coverage rollup。收益中等，但對大 seed sweep（序列合併成為尾延遲瓶頸）確有實益。

cocotb-coverage.summary_zh: Functional-coverage + constrained-random 層。由 spec 推導的 covergroup/coverpoint/cross 已完成；crv.py 約束求解器與 merge_coverage() 的 DB 合併已內建但尚未接上 — 價值／效益比最高的項目 (真正的約束求解器、跨執行的 coverage 合併、closure gate) 純粹是自有 fork 的接線工作。

pyuvm.summary: Python UVM (uvm_test/env/agent/driver/monitor/sequencer/scoreboard, factory/config_db/phasing/TLM, uvm_reg RAL). BAKED but ZERO plugin emission today; the open work is a UVM component-tree generator from the interface + protocol-synth classes and completing the RAL accessors.

rows.feature: pyuvm UVM testbench emission (uvm_test/env/agent/driver/monitor/sequencer/scoreboard from L1/L9 interface)
rows.commercial: Native UVM 1.2/2.0 in VCS / Xcelium / Questa
rows.notes: pyuvm 5.0.dev12 is BAKED but plugin emits none. Derive a UVM component tree from the interface + protocol-synth classes we already own (sent/avalon/profinet/spdif…). Factory/config_db/phasing all present in the fork — pure wiring + a template generator. This is the reason UVM was baked.
rows.feature_zh: pyuvm UVM testbench 產出（從 L1／L9 interface 產生 uvm_test／env／agent／driver／monitor／sequencer／scoreboard）
rows.notes_zh: pyuvm 5.0.dev12 已 BAKED，但 plugin 完全未產出。應從我們已擁有的 interface + protocol-synth 類別（sent／avalon／profinet／spdif…）推導出 UVM component tree。Factory／config_db／phasing 在 fork 中皆已具備——純粹是 wiring + 一個 template generator。這正是當初 bake UVM 的原因。
rows.reclass_note: [PLUGIN-WIRING-NOT-FORK] Every component the row names already exists in the library: test/env/agent/monitor/scoreboard/driver/subscriber (_s13_predefined_component_classes.py), sequencer (_s14_15_python_sequences.py:344), the 521-line factory (_s08_factory_classes.py), ConfigDB, and all 11 phases. The remaining work is a plugin-side template generator that derives a component tree from the L-docs — not fork code. Separately: uvm_virtual_sequencer is NOT an IEEE 1800.2 class (it is a user-side convention) and pyuvm already supports virtual sequences on master, so nothing was invented for it.

rows.feature: UVM RAL / register model (uvm_reg block auto-generated from the L-doc register map; front/back-door RW, mirror/predict)
rows.commercial: UVM RAL · VC Formal FRV · JasperGold CSR
rows.notes: pyuvm ships a _reg/uvm_reg subsystem but it's "under development" (missing atomic backdoor, field byte-access, single-field access). Two-part: (a) complete pyuvm RAL in the fork (the missing accessors) = real FAIL→PASS; (b) auto-emit a register block from the L-doc CSR map. Feeds the formal CSR app (V27).
rows.feature_zh: UVM RAL／register model（從 L-doc register map 自動產生 uvm_reg block；front／back-door RW、mirror／predict）
rows.notes_zh: pyuvm 內附 _reg／uvm_reg 子系統，但仍「開發中」（缺少 atomic backdoor、field byte-access、single-field access）。分兩部分：(a) 在 fork 中補齊 pyuvm RAL（缺少的 accessors）＝真實的 FAIL→PASS；(b) 從 L-doc CSR map 自動產出 register block。餵給 formal CSR app（V27）。

rows.feature: Sequence library / virtual sequences / layered + reactive stimulus
rows.notes: Once V4 lands: a per-protocol sequence library (reset seq, register-config seq, traffic seq) keyed off the interface class; virtual sequence to compose them.
rows.feature_zh: Sequence library／virtual sequences／分層 + reactive stimulus
rows.notes_zh: V4 落地後：以 interface 類別為鍵、per-protocol 的 sequence library（reset seq、register-config seq、traffic seq）；再用 virtual sequence 加以組合。

rows.feature: TLM analysis-port scoreboard / predictor comparators
rows.notes: pyuvm has full TLM (_s12_uvm_tlm_interfaces); wire the ref-model as a predictor on an analysis port so V4 reuses V3's scoreboard.
rows.feature_zh: TLM analysis-port scoreboard／predictor comparators
rows.notes_zh: pyuvm 具完整 TLM（_s12_uvm_tlm_interfaces）；將 ref-model 接成 analysis port 上的 predictor，讓 V4 可重用 V3 的 scoreboard。

rows.feature: Intra-test UVM parallelism (bound to single sim + GIL)
rows.notes: pyuvm runs as pure Python inside one cocotb simulation process, so it is bound both to the single simulator's serial event loop and to the CPython GIL — intra-test threading is neither available nor meaningful. Parallelism for pyuvm is inherently at the regression level (many independent tests/seeds), which the harness fan-out captures (cocotb PLL1). No fork work.
rows.feature_zh: 測試內 UVM 平行（受限於單一 sim ＋ GIL）
rows.notes_zh: pyuvm 以純 Python 跑在單一 cocotb 模擬 process 內，因此同時受限於單一模擬器的序列事件迴圈與 CPython GIL——測試內多執行緒既不可用也無意義。pyuvm 的平行本質在 regression 層（眾多獨立 test/seed），由 harness fan-out 承接（cocotb PLL1）。不做 fork 工作。

pyuvm.summary_zh: Python UVM（uvm_test／env／agent／driver／monitor／sequencer／scoreboard、factory／config_db／phasing／TLM、uvm_reg RAL）。已 BAKED，但目前 plugin 產出為零；未完成工作為從 interface + protocol-synth 類別產生 UVM component-tree 的產生器，以及補齊 RAL accessors。

sby.summary: Formal (SymbiYosys) + equivalence. Real unbounded safety (abc pdr) + bmc + inductive datapath proof with an honesty guard are done; sby already ships cover/live/unreached_covers unused — the open formal apps (multi-property FPV, formal cover, unreachability/FCA, SEC, functional CDC) are wiring-level on an owned engine.

rows.feature: Formalize L16 must/shall prose → provable SVA (not advisory stubs)
rows.notes: Close the honest gap in V16: the spec-to-assertion path turns each L16/L17 english_form into a real assert property, provable by V23. Requires semantic extraction + LLM confirm (per doctrine), then a formal gate.
rows.feature_zh: 將 L16 must/shall 敘述形式化 → 可證明的 SVA (而非僅供參考的 stub)
rows.notes_zh: 補齊 V16 誠實揭露的缺口：spec 轉斷言的路徑把每個 L16/L17 的 english_form 轉成真正的 assert property，可由 V23 證明。依準則須先語意抽取 + LLM 複核，再接上 formal gate。
rows.reclass_note: [PLUGIN-WIRING-NOT-FORK] Formalizing L16/L17 must/shall PROSE into provable SVA is plugin-side authoring driven by an LLM against the design documents. It is not fork code and cannot be gated as a fork FAIL->PASS.

rows.feature: Auto-extracted structural properties (AEP) — FSM deadlock/livelock, FIFO over/underflow, arithmetic overflow, onehot, unreachable-default
rows.notes: New generator: walk the RTL (we have yosys IR + FSM tables) and auto-emit always-valuable safety properties with NO spec input. Each is sby-provable (V23). High value: finds bugs for free, and feeds unreachability (V26).
rows.feature_zh: 自動抽取的結構性質 (AEP) — FSM deadlock/livelock、FIFO over/underflow、算術溢位、onehot、unreachable-default
rows.notes_zh: 新的產生器：走訪 RTL (我們已有 yosys IR + FSM 表)，在不需 spec 輸入的情況下自動產出恆有價值的 safety property。每一條都可由 sby 證明 (V23)。價值高：免費抓 bug，並餵給 unreachability 分析 (V26)。

rows.feature: Assertion-IP library for standard buses (AXI/APB/AHB/Wishbone/Avalon/SPI/UART/I2C protocol SVA)
rows.commercial: VC Formal AIP · JasperGold AIP · Questa QVIP
rows.notes: Commercial ships bus Assertion IP. We already own protocol-synth programs (avalon/sent/profinet/spdif…); factor a reusable, parameterized SVA property library per standard protocol, bind by interface detection.
rows.feature_zh: 標準匯流排的 Assertion-IP 函式庫 (AXI/APB/AHB/Wishbone/Avalon/SPI/UART/I2C 協定 SVA)
rows.notes_zh: 商用工具會提供匯流排 Assertion IP。我們已擁有 protocol-synth 程式 (avalon/sent/profinet/spdif…)；為每個標準協定抽出可重用、可參數化的 SVA property 函式庫，透過介面偵測自動綁定。

rows.feature: PSL property support
rows.notes: yosys/sby read PSL only partially; SVA is our lingua franca. Low demand — keep as SVA-first.
rows.feature_zh: PSL property 支援
rows.notes_zh: yosys/sby 對 PSL 僅部分支援；SVA 才是我們的通用語言。需求低 — 維持 SVA 優先。

rows.feature: SymbiYosys prove (abc pdr unbounded safety) + bmc (abc bmc3 bounded), no external SMT
rows.commercial: JasperGold FPV · VC Formal FPV · Questa PropCheck
rows.notes: eda_formal + formal_property_run.py; emit_reset_safety_harness (unbounded) + two-task .sby (prove+bmc); container ships NO z3/yices → abc engines (aigsmt none) used by design
rows.feature_zh: SymbiYosys prove (abc pdr 的 unbounded safety) + bmc (abc bmc3 的 bounded)，不需外部 SMT
rows.notes_zh: eda_formal + formal_property_run.py；emit_reset_safety_harness (unbounded) + 雙任務 .sby (prove+bmc)；容器內不含 z3/yices → 設計上使用 abc 引擎 (aigsmt none)。

rows.feature: Inductive-invariant UNBOUNDED datapath proof + honesty guard
rows.notes: --invariant-harness (abc pdr on a strengthened internal-state invariant); guard forbids a BMC dressed as unbounded; non-converging wide datapath reported PARTIAL/bounded with depth DISCLOSED; separate _inductive_results.json
rows.feature_zh: Inductive-invariant 的 UNBOUNDED datapath 證明 + 誠實性守衛
rows.notes_zh: --invariant-harness (在強化過的內部狀態 invariant 上跑 abc pdr)；守衛禁止把 BMC 偽裝成 unbounded；無法收斂的寬 datapath 回報 PARTIAL/bounded 並揭露 depth；獨立的 _inductive_results.json。

rows.feature: Multi-property FPV app: batch-prove all L16/L17/AEP properties, per-property PASS/FAIL/depth table + proof-core
rows.commercial: JasperGold FPV proof mgmt; VC Formal
rows.notes: Generalize formal_property_run from a single harness to a property regression: collect V16/V17/V18 SVA, prove each, emit a status matrix + minimal cex. formal_proof_evidence_check already gates all_proved honestly — extend to per-property.
rows.feature_zh: Multi-property FPV 應用：批次證明所有 L16/L17/AEP property，逐 property 的 PASS/FAIL/depth 表 + proof-core
rows.notes_zh: 把 formal_property_run 從單一 harness 推廣成 property 迴歸測試：收集 V16/V17/V18 的 SVA，逐一證明，產出狀態矩陣 + 最小 cex。formal_proof_evidence_check 已誠實地把關 all_proved — 擴充成逐 property 把關。

rows.feature: Formal cover (cover mode) — reachability + witness of cover statements
rows.notes: sby already has mode cover (+ witness trace) — the plugin never calls it. Wire it: prove each functional cover point reachable, emit the witness. Turns coverage goals into formal reachability, complements V8/V11.
rows.feature_zh: Formal cover (cover 模式) — cover 語句的可達性 + witness
rows.notes_zh: sby 已有 cover 模式 (+ witness trace) — plugin 從未呼叫。接上它：證明每個 functional cover point 可達，並產出 witness。把 coverage 目標轉為形式可達性，與 V8/V11 互補。

rows.feature: Liveness / fairness (live mode) — eventually-properties (req⇒eventually ack, no starvation)
rows.notes: sby ships mode live — never invoked. Emit s_eventually liveness for L17 handshakes; wire the live task. Wiring of an owned engine.
rows.feature_zh: Liveness / fairness (live 模式) — eventually 類性質 (req⇒eventually ack、無 starvation)
rows.notes_zh: sby 內建 live 模式 — 從未被呼叫。為 L17 握手產出 s_eventually liveness；接上 live 任務。屬於自有引擎的接線工作。
rows.reclass_note: [EXT-CEILING] Unbounded liveness (sby `mode live`) needs the aiger/aigsmt engine family, which is absent from the in-container toolchain. Measured, not assumed. This is a tool-availability ceiling for a publishable gate, not a missing capability in our fork.

rows.feature: Formal coverage / unreachability analysis (FCA / UNR) — prove uncovered code/functional bins are truly unreachable → exclude from closure
rows.commercial: VC Formal FCA · JasperGold UNR · Questa CoverCheck
rows.notes: sby already computes unreached_covers (sby_core.py). Build the app: turn each uncovered bin (from V8/V12) into a cover point, run cover, and any provably-unreachable bin becomes a signed exclusion in the closure report (V20). Directly closes coverage the way commercial does — huge value, wiring-level effort.
rows.feature_zh: Formal coverage / unreachability 分析 (FCA / UNR) — 證明未涵蓋的 code/functional bin 確實不可達 → 從 closure 中排除
rows.notes_zh: sby 已能計算 unreached_covers (sby_core.py)。建置此應用：把每個未涵蓋的 bin (來自 V8/V12) 轉成 cover point，跑 cover，任何可證明不可達的 bin 即成為 closure 報告 (V20) 中經簽核的排除項。以商用工具的方式直接收斂 coverage — 價值極大、僅屬接線層級的工作量。

rows.feature: Formal CSR / register verification (FRV) — prove RW/RO/W1C/RC field semantics, reset value, address decode from the register map
rows.notes: Auto-generate register-contract SVA from the L-doc CSR map (V5) and prove with sby. Pairs the RAL model (dynamic) with a formal register proof (static).
rows.feature_zh: Formal CSR / 暫存器驗證 (FRV) — 從 register map 證明 RW/RO/W1C/RC 欄位語意、reset 值、位址解碼
rows.notes_zh: 從 L-doc 的 CSR map (V5) 自動產生 register-contract SVA 並以 sby 證明。將 RAL 模型 (動態) 與 formal 暫存器證明 (靜態) 搭配。

rows.feature: Formal connectivity check (CC) — prove SoC pin-to-pin connectivity vs a connectivity spec
rows.notes: Generate connectivity assertions (always @* assert(dst == src) w/ conditions) from a connectivity map + prove. Relevant once designs are SoC-scale (caravel-class).
rows.feature_zh: Formal connectivity 檢查 (CC) — 對照 connectivity spec 證明 SoC 的 pin 對 pin 連通性
rows.notes_zh: 從 connectivity map 產生連通性斷言 (帶條件的 always @* assert(dst == src)) 並證明。當設計達到 SoC 規模 (caravel 等級) 時才有意義。

rows.feature: Formal X-propagation (FXP) — prove X can't reach outputs; trace X to source
rows.commercial: VC Formal FXP · JasperGold X-Prop · Questa X-Check
rows.notes: Dual-rail / two-valued X-model miter (each net → value+defined pair), prove defined(out) under defined inputs. Forkable via a yosys X-encoding pass + sby; the X-encoding transform is the real work. Ties to reset→no-X (V16) and debug (V33).
rows.feature_zh: Formal X-propagation (FXP) — 證明 X 不會傳到輸出；把 X 追蹤到源頭
rows.notes_zh: Dual-rail / 雙值 X-model miter (每條 net → value+defined 配對)，在輸入皆已定義下證明 defined(out)。可透過 yosys X-encoding pass + sby fork 實作；X-encoding 轉換才是真正的工作。與 reset→no-X (V16) 及除錯 (V33) 相關。
rows.reclass_note: [BLOCKED-ON-PRIMITIVE] Formal X-propagation (FXP) needs a standalone yosys dual-rail X-ENCODING TRANSFORM PASS — a named, buildable primitive that does not exist yet. That pass is the item; FXP follows from it.

rows.feature: Vacuity / over-constraint / dead-assume detection
rows.notes: Detect a property that passes only because an assume made the antecedent unreachable (false confidence). sby cover on the trigger; flag never-triggered antecedents. Cheap correctness-of-the-proof guard.
rows.feature_zh: Vacuity / over-constraint / dead-assume 偵測
rows.notes_zh: 偵測某 property 只因某個 assume 使前提 (antecedent) 變得不可達才通過 (虛假的信心)。對觸發條件跑 sby cover；標記從未被觸發的前提。是廉價的『證明本身正確性』守衛。

rows.feature: Auto invariant generation / auto-abstraction (strengthen until inductive)
rows.notes: V22's harness is authored by hand. Auto-generating the strengthening invariant (IC3/PDR lemma lifting, counterexample-guided) is genuine research — subsystem named (abc pdr lemmas), not a wall. Ship manual V22 + memory abstraction first.
rows.feature_zh: 自動 invariant 產生 / 自動抽象化 (強化到 inductive 為止)
rows.notes_zh: V22 的 harness 是手工撰寫的。自動產生強化用的 invariant (IC3/PDR lemma lifting、counterexample-guided) 是真正的研究課題 — 子系統已具名 (abc pdr lemmas)，並非死路。先交付手動的 V22 + memory abstraction。

rows.feature: Memory-abstraction formal ($mem as array theory, not flattened)
rows.notes: Keep $mem as an uninterpreted array (read/write axioms) instead of flattening to gates (blows up). Shared with the yosys Y-LEC1 item; real SMT array-theory work.
rows.feature_zh: Memory-abstraction formal ($mem 以 array theory 處理，而非攤平)
rows.notes_zh: 把 $mem 保留為 uninterpreted array (read/write 公理)，而非攤平成 gate (會爆炸)。與 yosys 的 Y-LEC1 項目共用；屬真正的 SMT array-theory 工作。

rows.feature: Structural CDC + reset-dependency checks (gates)
rows.notes: cdc_crossing_check.py, cdc_async_input_check.py, reset_dependency_check.py — structural synchronizer/async-input/reset-domain gates already in the flow
rows.feature_zh: 結構性 CDC + reset-dependency 檢查 (gate)
rows.notes_zh: cdc_crossing_check.py、cdc_async_input_check.py、reset_dependency_check.py — 結構性的 synchronizer/async-input/reset-domain gate 已在流程中。

rows.feature: Functional (formal) CDC — prove synchronizer correctness, gray-code FIFO pointers, data-stability + handshake protocol on each crossing
rows.commercial: JasperGold CDC · VC Formal CDC · Questa Formal CDC
rows.notes: Elevate V37's structural findings to formal proofs: from each detected crossing, emit stability/gray/handshake SVA and prove with sby. Metastability-accurate modeling at scale is the hard part; the per-crossing property generation is tractable.
rows.feature_zh: Functional (formal) CDC — 證明 synchronizer 正確性、gray-code FIFO 指標、每個 crossing 的 data-stability + handshake 協定
rows.notes_zh: 把 V37 的結構性發現提升為 formal 證明：從每個偵測到的 crossing 產出 stability/gray/handshake SVA 並以 sby 證明。大規模下精確建模 metastability 是困難之處；逐 crossing 的 property 產生則屬可處理範圍。

rows.feature: Reset-domain-crossing (RDC) structural + functional
rows.notes: Extend reset_dependency_check to enumerate RDCs (async reset in one domain sampled in another) + emit RDC assertions for sby.
rows.feature_zh: Reset-domain-crossing (RDC) 結構性 + functional
rows.notes_zh: 擴充 reset_dependency_check 以列舉 RDC (某域的 async reset 在另一域被取樣) + 為 sby 產出 RDC 斷言。

rows.feature: Glitch / reconvergence / combinational-CDC detection + hierarchical CDC + waiver mgmt
rows.notes: Reconvergent-fanout after a crossing, combinational logic in the crossing path; hierarchical roll-up + a structured waiver file (mirror the DRC waiver-mgmt pattern).
rows.feature_zh: Glitch / reconvergence / combinational-CDC 偵測 + 階層式 CDC + waiver 管理
rows.notes_zh: crossing 之後的 reconvergent-fanout、crossing 路徑中的組合邏輯；階層式彙整 + 結構化 waiver 檔 (比照 DRC waiver 管理模式)。

rows.feature: RTL-vs-gate sequential equivalence (LEC) via yosys equiv_induct -seq 4→16→64 escalation
rows.notes: Shared w/ the yosys tool: lec_post_layout_check.build_yosys_equiv_script + eda_lvs yosys_equiv; abc dsec/dprove reachable; buggy latency-7-vs-8 pair stays UNPROVEN (sound, not a rubber-stamp)
rows.feature_zh: RTL 對 gate 的 sequential equivalence (LEC)，透過 yosys equiv_induct -seq 4→16→64 逐級加深
rows.notes_zh: 與 yosys 工具共用：lec_post_layout_check.build_yosys_equiv_script + eda_lvs yosys_equiv；可達 abc dsec/dprove；有 bug 的 latency-7-vs-8 配對維持 UNPROVEN (可靠，不是橡皮圖章)。

rows.feature: SEC app: RTL-vs-RTL / pre-vs-post-ECO / retiming / clock-gating equivalence (arbitrary latency, different state encoding)
rows.commercial: JasperGold SEC · VC Formal SEQ · Questa SLEC · OneSpin EC
rows.notes: Package a proper SEC flow on the owned engine: build the two-design miter, auto-map primary I/O, -seq escalate, DISCLOSE bounded vs unbounded. Validates ECOs and the yosys retiming/clock-gating passes (Y-RT1/Y-LP2) the honest way.
rows.feature_zh: SEC 應用：RTL 對 RTL / ECO 前對後 / retiming / clock-gating 等價性 (任意 latency、不同 state 編碼)
rows.notes_zh: 在自有引擎上封裝完整的 SEC 流程：建立雙設計 miter、自動對映 primary I/O、-seq 逐級加深、揭露 bounded 或 unbounded。以誠實方式驗證 ECO 以及 yosys 的 retiming/clock-gating pass (Y-RT1/Y-LP2)。

rows.feature: Power-intent / X-optimization equivalence (UPF, isolation/retention)
rows.notes: Equivalence under UPF isolation/retention semantics — real low-power-intent modeling. Named subsystem; low current demand.
rows.feature_zh: Power-intent / X-optimization 等價性 (UPF、isolation/retention)
rows.notes_zh: 在 UPF isolation/retention 語意下的等價性 — 真正的 low-power-intent 建模。子系統已具名；目前需求低。

rows.feature: Datapath validation (C/spec-vs-RTL word-level equivalence, DPV)
rows.notes: Word-level miter ($mul/$add kept abstract) vs a golden operator spec; overlaps V22/V32. Ship the inductive datapath proof first.
rows.feature_zh: Datapath 驗證 (C/spec 對 RTL 的 word-level 等價性，DPV)
rows.notes_zh: Word-level miter ($mul/$add 維持抽象) 對照 golden operator spec；與 V22/V32 重疊。先交付 inductive datapath 證明。

rows.feature: CEX / VCD-FST trace emission + failing-property narration
rows.notes: sby writes cex .vcd; cocotb dumps VCD/FST; the formal-verify skill narrates the cex frame (AI backstop) — never "obviously holds" without a PROVEN verdict
rows.feature_zh: CEX / VCD-FST trace 產出 + failing-property 敘述
rows.notes_zh: sby 寫出 cex .vcd；cocotb 傾印 VCD/FST；formal-verify skill 敘述 cex frame (AI 後盾) — 沒有 PROVEN 判定就絕不說『顯然成立』。

rows.feature: Automated trace triage — map failing property/cover-hole → RTL source line + minimal failing trace
rows.notes: Program-first: parse the sby/cocotb trace, tie the failing signal back to the RTL declaration + the minimal cex slice, emit a structured triage JSON. Forkable (no GUI needed); the AI narrates from structured facts.
rows.feature_zh: 自動化 trace 分診 — 把 failing property/cover-hole 對映到 RTL 源碼行 + 最小的失敗 trace
rows.notes_zh: 程式優先：解析 sby/cocotb 的 trace，把失敗訊號連回 RTL 宣告 + 最小 cex 切片，產出結構化的分診 JSON。可 fork (不需 GUI)；AI 依結構化事實敘述。

rows.feature: X-source tracing (trace an X back to its origin)
rows.commercial: VC Formal FXP debug; Verdi X-trace
rows.notes: Follows V29: on an X-prop failure, walk the dual-rail miter cex to the first undefined driver.
rows.feature_zh: X-source 追蹤 (把 X 追回其源頭)
rows.notes_zh: 接續 V29：發生 X-prop 失敗時，走訪 dual-rail miter 的 cex 直到第一個未定義的 driver。
rows.reclass_note: [BLOCKED-ON-PREREQUISITE] X-source tracing walks the dual-rail miter counterexample, so it is blocked on V29's X-encoding pass. Do not pick this up before V29.

rows.feature: Interactive waveform GUI / schematic cross-probe
rows.notes: A GUI signoff-debug environment is not a fork target. Honest OSS answer = GTKWave / Surfer (waveform) + our automated triage (V46) for the batch/CI path. Don't classify as an "OSS ceiling" — the batch-debug capability IS forkable (V46/V47); only the interactive GUI is external.
rows.feature_zh: 互動式波形 GUI / 電路圖 cross-probe
rows.notes_zh: GUI 簽核除錯環境不是 fork 目標。誠實的 OSS 解法 = GTKWave / Surfer (波形) + 我們的自動化分診 (V46) 走 batch/CI 路徑。不要歸類為『OSS 天花板』— batch 除錯能力是可 fork 的 (V46/V47)；只有互動式 GUI 屬外部。

rows.feature: Fault-injection / safety-mechanism verification (ISO 26262 FuSa)
rows.commercial: VC Formal FuSa · JasperGold FSV · OneSpin FuSa
rows.notes: Forkable via mutation: inject stuck-at/bit-flip faults, prove the safety mechanism (parity/ECC/lockstep) detects them. Ties to V50.
rows.feature_zh: Fault-injection / safety-mechanism 驗證 (ISO 26262 FuSa)
rows.notes_zh: 可透過 mutation fork：注入 stuck-at/bit-flip 故障，證明 safety mechanism (parity/ECC/lockstep) 能偵測到。與 V50 相關。

rows.feature: Mutation coverage (does the TB actually catch injected bugs?)
rows.notes: YosysHQ mcy (mutation-coverage-with-yosys) is NOT baked. Honest path: adopt+bake mcy (external-by-integration, we own yosys) → it drives our sby/cocotb bench to grade the testbench. Real "is my verification any good" metric.
rows.feature_zh: Mutation coverage (TB 真的能抓到注入的 bug 嗎？)
rows.notes_zh: YosysHQ 的 mcy (mutation-coverage-with-yosys) 尚未內建。誠實路徑：採用並內建 mcy (以整合方式引入外部工具，yosys 為我們自有) → 由它驅動我們的 sby/cocotb bench 來評分 testbench。這是真正衡量『我的驗證到底好不好』的指標。

rows.feature: Parallel task/engine scheduling (already upstream)
rows.commercial: Cadence Jasper multi-property / multi-engine parallel proofs
rows.notes: SymbiYosys ALREADY runs work in parallel: SbyTaskloop schedules multiple tasks concurrently and each acquires a make-jobserver lease (jobclient.request_lease) so total cores are globally budgeted, and autotune runs its engine trials in parallel. Multi-engine / multi-property proof fan-out is upstream and consumed as-is. Reference only — no new fork work.
rows.feature_zh: 平行 task／engine 排程（upstream 已有）
rows.notes_zh: SymbiYosys 已平行執行：SbyTaskloop 併行排程多個 task，每個以 make-jobserver 租約（jobclient.request_lease）取得核心、全域預算控管，autotune 也平行跑各 engine 試驗。多 engine／多 property 證明 fan-out 已在 upstream、直接沿用。列為參考，不做新 fork 工作。

sby.summary_zh: 形式驗證 (SymbiYosys) + 等價性檢查。真正的 unbounded safety 證明 (abc pdr) + bmc + 附誠實性守衛的 inductive datapath 證明皆已完成；sby 本身已內建 cover/live/unreached_covers 卻尚未使用 — 尚待開發的 formal 應用 (multi-property FPV、formal cover、unreachability/FCA、SEC、functional CDC) 在自有引擎上僅屬接線層級的工作。
